item.title: DBA Mega Pastry
item.beer_description: DBA Mega Pastry Double Kentucky Bourbon Barrel-Aged Imperial Pineapple & Vanilla Stout This is DBA Mega Pastry. A double Kentucky bourbon barrel-aged imperial stout with pineapple and vanilla. Just as you'd expect. Boom! The bottled version of the gravity-poured, barrel-served, extremely limited, festival and style winner Dugges Future Double Barrel-Aged Mega (Gravity Pour) flavored with pineapple and vanilla? Yes, but that's it! Our imperial stout Mega, aged in two different types of Kentucky Bourbon barrels for extra much, more, most! And then, in with pineapple and just the right amount of vanilla. Because 'more is more'. Sometime around 2005 or 2006 we wanted to brew a jaw-dropping brew. This jaw-dropping brew became, after a bit of experimentation and refinement, Idjit, one of our most iconic beers. Fast forward to 2021, when we wanted to reconnect with that ambition, by not just brewing something big, bigger or biggest, but brewing something mega! Since then, we've made countless versions of Mega. And, here's another one. Based on DBA Mega, here's a pastry stout our way. Balanced adult candy with a flavor profile that shouldn't really work with that plays in perfect harmony. It sings in your mouth. Deluxe! Dugges Bryggeri - DBA Mega Pastry

item.title: DBA Mega
item.beer_description: DBA Mega Double Kentucky Bourbon Barrel-Aged Imperial Stout This is DBA Mega. A double Kentucky bourbon barrel-aged imperial stout. Just as you'd expect. Boom! The bottled version of the gravity-poured, barrel-served, extremely limited, festival and style winner Dugges Future Double Barrel-Aged Mega (Gravity Pour)? Yes, but that's it! Our imperial stout Mega, aged in two different types of Kentucky Bourbon barrels for extra, more, most! Because 'more is more'. In the early days of Dugges, sometime around 2005 or 2006, we brewed a 16% imperial stout that never saw the light of day. It just didn't taste right. But, when we scaled down the recipe, it suddenly tasted really good! What tasted really good became Idjit. One of our most iconic beers. Fast forward to 2021, when we wanted to reconnect with that ambition, not just to brew something big, bigger or biggest, but to brew something mega! Extra everything, even more on top and a generous pinch of everything you could ever want. And then some. Since then, we have made countless versions of Mega. But, never actually any pure barrel-aged. This is how it is. Double-barrel-aged too. Because, it wouldn't be Mega if you didn't max it out. So to speak. Explosion! Dugges Bryggeri - DBA Mega

item.title: Off the Rack American Whiskey 2025 By Rackhouse
item.beer_description: A true expression of an Off The Rack Imperial Stout from Rackhouse, this beer has layers of complexity that were crafted in the blending process, picking the best of the best barrels for this limited release. Expect notes of rich chocolate, light roasted coffee, and vanilla, with a heavenly American whiskey finish. LERVIG - Off the Rack American Whiskey 2025 By Rackhouse

item.title: Five By Rackhouse
item.beer_description: To celebrate five years of Rackhouse, we revisited the idea behind 3 Bean and pushed it deeper with more complexity. Five builds on that familiar foundation of cacao, tonka, and vanilla, with coffee and carob added to mark the occasion. Extended time in oak brings everything together. Layers of dark chocolate, espresso, and subtle spice are rounded by barrel character. It’s big, decadent, and made to be savoured. LERVIG - Five By Rackhouse

item.title: Static Motion
item.beer_description: A Hazy TIPA with Citra, Nelson Sauvin & Motueka. 'Static Motion is a massively dry hopped Triple Hazy IPA with Citra, Nelson and Motueka. Expect notes of juicy mango, fresh lime, grapefruit and earthy notes of white wine and white pepper.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Static Motion

item.title: Alchemy 2026
item.beer_description: A Hazy IPA With Motueka & Citra. 'This is 2026 version of our Alchemy, a Hazy IPA brewed originally with Track Brewing. Citra and Motueka together makes a great fruity hop combo. Expect notes of fresh lime, juicy mango, grapefruit and a touch of dankness.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Alchemy 2026

item.title: Unseen Brewing Co. - Pair
item.beer_description: The Unseen Brewing Co. - Pair contains: - Unseen - Slow FocusIPA - New England / Hazy | 7% | 330 ml - Unseen - Frozen RageIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8,2% | 330 ml

item.title: Rivington Brewing Co - Triplet
item.beer_description: The Rivington Brewing Co - Triplet contains: - Rivington - One By OneIPA - New England / Hazy | 6,5% | 500 ml - Rivington - FacultyIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 500 ml - Rivington - Fear and EgoIPA - Triple | 10% | 500 ml

item.title: Overturn
item.beer_description: Collapse into the comforting embrace of this Gold Top DIPA. Citra, Motueka, Eggers Special and Galaxy are the conductors of the orchestra of indulgence, which sings in a symphony of luxurious flavour. Sharp and zippy pomelo spritz meets pineapple tepache and ice cold limoncello, sliding into passionfruit liqueur and slithers of dried mango, before slice after slice of key lime pie and peach crumble. Lactose blankets the palate with satin smoothness and ramps up the decadence even further. Track Brewing Company - Overturn

item.title: Abundance
item.beer_description: Try all you might against the ineluctable allure of this Gold Top DIPA. Citra, Nectaron, Luminosa and Riwaka weave a tapestry of temptation, embroidered with hop extravagance and the style's signature unctuousness. A tropical punch of papaya, pineapple, passionfruit, mango and guava is followed by some welcome acidity from grapefruit, kumquat and tangy peach fizz. Lactose elevates the sweetness, decorates your palate with creaminess and smoothes out all the edges. Track Brewing Company - Abundance

item.title: Kaja (Cellar Series)
item.beer_description: A decadent imperial porter aged in Finnish rye whisky barrels and infused with exotic amburana wood. Pohjala - Kaja (Cellar Series)

item.title: The Doorway Effect (collab Left Handed Giant)
item.beer_description: An 8% New England DIPA brewed in collaboration with Left Handed Giant Earlier this year, and by pure coincidence, both breweries selected identical lots of Mosaic & Simcoe (Coleman Farm, Oregon) and Nectaron & Nelson Sauvin (Mac Hops, NZ). From there, the doors opened, and the recipes diverged. The result is two distinct 8% DIPAs that explore the wildly different consequences our brewing choices can have. Our half of the story, ‘The Doorway Effect’, lands today on the webshop. It’s a big, hoppy monster of a DIPA designed to showcase the vibrancy of these specific lots. Expect saturated hop aroma and a rounded mouthfeel. It’s bright, zippy, juicy, and even a little wild around the edges. Across the hallway, LHG have crafted their own interpretation: ‘Hidden Volumes’. Go check it out, it's available on their webshop now. Same starting point, two different paths. Only you can decide how the story ends Verdant Brewing Co - The Doorway Effect
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Flux: Phase 6 (collab Track)
item.beer_description: For our second collection of phase haze beers with the wonderful Track we are shifting towards experimental NZ varieties alongside the established US star that is Citra. In this DIPA, NZH-106 take the lead! This hop is the daughter of Riwaka and doesn't shy away from those crazy diesel notes that blend into squishy fruits of all descriptions. This is a big, boisterous romp of a beer! Verdant Brewing Co - Flux: Phase 6
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Flux: Phase 5 (collab Track)
item.beer_description: For our second collection of phase haze beers with the wonderful Track we are shifting towards experimental NZ varieties alongside the established US star that is Citra. In this IPA Citra takes the lead bringing strong notes of mango and grapefruit alongside more complex New Zealand hedgerow notes and hidden tropical gems. Classy and decadent. Verdant Brewing Co - Flux: Phase 5

item.title: SolidØl Royal Brackla
item.beer_description: A rich, warming barleywine matured in a Royal Brackla cask. The aroma and flavour reveal notes of caramel, nuts and dark raisins, aged in whisky, with a long, smooth finish. Varvar Brew - Solidl Royal Brackla

item.title: Hop Hooligans - Quartet
item.beer_description: The Hop Hooligans - Quartet contains: - FortunioIPA - New England / Hazy | 6% | 500 ml - Psychedelic WisdomIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 500 ml - Trench Coat ContrabandIPA - Triple | 10% | 500 ml - Grog BlossomStout - Imperial / Double Pastry | 12% | 500 ml

item.title: Port Wine X Brandy Barrel Aged Imperial Stout
item.beer_description: A deep and luxurious Imperial Stout aged in a blend of Port wine and brandy barrels — all sourced from Portugal. Layers of dark chocolate, dried fruits, and rich malt meet notes of oak, warming spirit character, and subtle sweetness from the barrels. Complex, smooth, and built for slow enjoyment. Arpus Brewing Co. - Port Wine X Brandy Barrel Aged Imperial Stout

item.title: FUERST WIACEK Berlin - Quartet
item.beer_description: The FUERST WIACEK Berlin - Quartet contains: - It's All WavyIPA - New England / Hazy | 6,8% | 440 ml - Soft ApocalypseIPA - New England / Hazy | 6,8% | 440 ml - Hawt (2026)IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - Nelson Krush (2026)IPA - Imperial / Double | 8% | 440 ml

item.title: Ummagumma
item.beer_description: A Hazy DIPA with Nelson Sauvin, Rakau, Motueka & Peacharine. 'Ummagumma is brewed with our good friends at Juova. We celebrate the 5th anniversary of Juova Hanahuone with this beautiful Hazy DIPA with Nelson Sauvin, Rakau, Motueka and Peacharine. Expect aromas of white wine, white pepper, fresh lime, peach rings and other stone fruits.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Ummagumma
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Reveries Of... Citra
item.beer_description: A Single Hop Hazy IPA with Citra hops. 'The new 2025 crop of Citra is here. We contracted two beautiful lots and they are both on display with this Single Hop Hazy Ipa. Expect notes of mango, grapefruit, some dankness and a pleasant grassiness.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Reveries Of... Citra

item.title: Pedal Point
item.beer_description: A Hazy Double IPA with Nelson Sauvin & Citra. 'With Pedal Point we went with the classic hop combo of Nelson Sauvin and Citra. Expect complex aroma of mango, grapefruit, white pepper and white wine with some of that sticky dankness.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Pedal Point
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Beyond Youth
item.beer_description: A Hazy Quadruple IPA with Nelson Sauvin, Motueka and Riwaka. Beyond Youth continues our Quadruple Hazy IPA series. This time with Nelson Sauvin, Motueka and Riwaka. For a couple of our latest QIPAs we have found a yeast that attenuates these big beers a bit drier than before. I feel it gives these big ones more drinkability and lets the hops shine even more. Expect notes of Nelson's earthiness, white wine, lime and bright grapefruit. Factory Brewing - Beyond Youth

item.title: Sunshake
item.beer_description: A smooth, hazy dip featuring CITRA, CITRA CRYO & KRUSH. DosKiwis - Sunshake

item.title: Sidereal
item.beer_description: A CRISP, MODERN WEST COAST IPA FEATURING ROCK, CITRA CRYO & COLUMBUS CRYO. DosKiwis - Sidereal

item.title: Hindsight 20/20
item.beer_description: A HAZY DIPA FEATURING SIMCOE CRYING, STONE, STRATA & MOSAIC. DosKiwis - Hindsight 20/20

item.title: Altitude
item.beer_description: A SMOOTH HAZY IPA FEATURING NECTARON, WOOD, MOSAIC CRYO & WAIMEA FRESH HOP JUICE. DosKiwis - Altitude

item.title: Double Happiness (V7) - Metal Dog
item.beer_description: Double Happiness: Metal Dog is a groundbreaking Triple Dry Hopped Hazy DIPA. With a powerful alcohol percentage of 8.2%, this beer serves as a stage for the very latest hop innovations. Here, Maktoob combines the iconic American Citra hop with Manilita, a rare experimental variety from Freestyle Hops in New Zealand. The triple cold hopping creates an extreme saturation of aromas, where the classic tropical notes of Citra are enhanced by the unique, intense fruit profiles of the overseas newcomer. Maktoob - Double Happiness (V7) - Metal Dog
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Double Happiness (V8) Water Pig
item.beer_description: Double Happiness: Water Pig is a groundbreaking Triple Dry Hopped Hazy DIPA in which two of the world's most beloved hop varieties come together. Here, Maktoob combines the legendary American Citra hop with the New Zealand powerhouse Nectaron. Thanks to the triple cold hopping, this 8.2% beer is fully saturated with aromatic oils. It is a masterful NEDIPA that perfectly blends the intense, sweet peach characteristics of Nectaron with the bright citrus backbone of Citra. Maktoob - Double Happiness: Water Pig
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Blind Date
item.beer_description: Blind Date is an intense, Triple Dry Hopped (TDH) Hazy Double IPA at 8.0% that brings together the absolute top of New Zealand hop varieties. For this brew, Maktoob Brewing uses Riwaka and the rare Nelson Bliss selection from Freestyle Hops—a specific, extremely carefully harvested batch of Nelson Sauvin known for its unprecedented aromatic power. The triple cold hopping creates a beer that completely overwhelms the senses with lush fruit aromas and a velvety texture. Maktoob - Blind Date
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: A Day at the Beach
item.beer_description: A Day at the Beach is a summery yet extremely powerful 8.0% Triple Dry Hopped (TDH) Hazy Double IPA with which Maktoob Brewing takes you straight into the future of hop cultivation. Alongside the well-known New Zealand classic Motueka, this brew utilizes HQG1 and HQG3. These are two extremely rare, experimental hop varieties from the prestigious Hop Quality Group program (supported by iconic American breweries such as Sierra Nevada and Russian River). This cutting-edge hop combination delivers an unprecedented deluge of fruity aromas and rich thiols. Maktoob - A Day at the Beach
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Slow Focus
item.beer_description: Take a moment to blur out the noise with Slow Focus, a velvety NEIPA featuring Nelson Sauvin and Rakau hops. Expect a lush, tranquil escape into notes of white grape and stone fruit—smooth, hazy, and as effortlessly cool as a koala on a Sunday afternoon. Unseen Brewing Co. - Slow Focus

item.title: Frozen Rage
item.beer_description: Embrace the chill with Frozen Bear, a powerful DIPA engineered for a deep freeze of flavor. This frosty beast blends Riwaka, Wakatu, and Citra (T90 & Cryo), amplified by a surge of Riwaka Hop Kief for an intense blast of citrus and resinous passion fruit. Unseen Brewing Co. - Frozen Rage
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Golden Hour
item.beer_description: A beer to enjoy at sunset, when life is more beautiful. Lemondrop, Vic Secret, and Southern Cross combine in a beer with citrus notes and a dry, vegetal finish. It's both sweet and bitter, a bit like life itself. Double NEIPA w. 24g/l Vic Secret, Lemondrop & Southern Cross Sparkle - Golden Hour
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Surfing Paradise
item.beer_description: A double DDH NEIPA just the way we like it, well-hopped with a Double Dry-Hop (DDH) at 24g/l. The NZ Cascade & Peacharine duo takes center stage here. As you've probably guessed, we're taking you surfing in New Zealand on smooth and fruity waves. Sparkle - Surfing Paradise
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Life Is A Beach
item.beer_description: A double NEIPA DDH just the way we like it, well-hopped with a Double Dry-Hop (DDH) at 24g/l. The Simcoe and Eclipse duo take center stage here. While the Simcoe brings lovely tropical fruit notes, the Eclipse transports us to Australia with its delightful orange notes. Sparkle - Life Is A Beach
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Birthday #3 Nectaron (2026)
item.beer_description: Sparkle is celebrating its 3rd anniversary 🎂 To mark the occasion, we've brewed 3 ULTRA IPAs just the way we like to: intensely hoppy and deliciously fruity. Birthday #3 is our brand new anniversary beer, a special 3-year celebration. It features a hop we've been waiting for since we opened and finally managed to get our hands on this year: Nectaron, with a powerful dry hop of 30g/l to bring out all its aromas. It's a fruit bomb that hits the spot every time! By enjoying this beer, you're celebrating with us the first years of a great hoppy adventure. Thank you so much for being a part of it! Sparkle - Birthday #3 Nectaron (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Birthday #2 Peacharine (2026)
item.beer_description: Sparkle is celebrating its 3rd anniversary 🎂 To mark the occasion, we've brewed 3 ULTRA IPAs just the way we like to: intensely hoppy and deliciously fruity. Birthday #2 is our second anniversary beer, brewed in 2025 and reviewed and improved every year. It highlights Peacharine and its sweet, fruity, and comforting notes, combined with a touch of Nelson Sauvin in a powerful 30g/L dry hop. By enjoying this beer, you're celebrating with us the first years of a great hoppy adventure. Thank you so much for being a part of it! Sparkle - Birthday #2 Peacharine (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Birthday #1 Riwaka (2026)
item.beer_description: Sparkle is celebrating its 3rd anniversary 🎂 To mark the occasion, we've brewed 3 ULTRA IPAs just the way we like to: intensely hoppy and deliciously fruity. Birthday #1 is our first anniversary beer brewed in 2024, reviewed and improved every year. It showcases our favorite hop: Riwaka, combined with a touch of Nelson Sauvin in a powerful 30g/L dry hop. With its fruity, dank, and slightly diesel notes, it's sure to make an impression. By enjoying this beer, you're celebrating with us the first years of a great hoppy adventure. Thank you so much for being a part of it! Sparkle - Birthday #1 Riwaka (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Best Come Correct (collab Two Villains)
item.beer_description: Hops: Bold River Nectaron, Eggers Nelson Sauvin & NZ Cascade Back at it with our bad boy bros @twovillainsbrewing to produce some straight backpack 'true school' liquid. A little more sweetness and body on this one that got a true pummeling NZ goodness. Tropical Lofi downbeats from the Nectaron easy you in while the gooseberry and white grape from the Nelson Sauvin take you for a free ride on the darts and the red berry and pine from NZ Cascade thump you in the finish with that Boom Bap.
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: One By One
item.beer_description: A DDH IPA hopped with Peacharine, Idaho 7, Nelson Sauvin Amplifire, Simcoe, Simcoe Cryo, Simcoe Dynaboost & Simcoe Hyperboost Rivington Brewing Co - One By One

item.title: Fear and Ego (collab Ārpus)
item.beer_description: A Triple IPA brewed with our mates from Arpus Brewing in Latvia. Hopped with Mosaic, Citra, Mosaic Cryo, Citra Cryo, Mosaic Dynaboost & Citra Hyperboost Rivington Brewing Co - Fear and Ego

item.title: Faculty
item.beer_description: A Double IPA hopped with Galaxy, Riwaka and Nectaron Cryo Rivington Brewing Co - Faculty
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Soft Apocalypse
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Citra, Nectaron & HBC 638. FUERST WIACEK Berlin - Soft Apocalypse

item.title: Nelson Krush (2026)
item.beer_description: TRIPLE dry hopped with Nelson Sauvin & Krush - As your face approaches the glass you're greeted with the bright, intense aromas of grape, lychee and galia melon. Then as the beer hits your lips it's a tropical f**k storm of bitter green grape, kiwi, sweet green apple skin, succulent pear and zesty, refreshing lime. It's sticky and juicy and as thick as a bowl full of custard. Who says the third installment is always the worst?! This one feels like the grand finale! - Kiwi, Green Apple, Pear, Mango, Grape FUERST WIACEK Berlin - Nelson Krush (2026)

item.title: It's All Wavy
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Citra, Peacharine & Riwaka. FUERST WIACEK Berlin - It's All Wavy

item.title: Hawt (2026)
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Simcoe & Mosaic. The dynamic duo of Simcoe and Mosaic make this DIPA so hot it’ll burn your tongue. This one smells of pine, forest soil, fresh orange zest and the deep green scent of marjoram. It’s all big chewy mouthfuls of lemon, lemongrass, sweet mint and that Mosaic classic, Juicy Fruit gum. It’s thicker than a crude oil milkshake and the finish lasts longer than the Duracell Bunny on amphetamines. Canned On: 14. Apr. 2026 FUERST WIACEK Berlin - Hawt (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Seven Island Brewery - Quartet
item.beer_description: The Seven Island Brewery - Quartet contains: - Seven Island - Dimensional Hop RageIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - Seven Island - Phantom of the HoperaIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - Seven Island - Forager of the Hop SkullsIPA - Triple New England / Hazy | 9,2% | 440 ml - Seven Island - Hop MassacreIPA - Triple New England / Hazy | 9,2% | 440 ml

item.title: Phantom of the Hopera (collab Mikerphone)
item.beer_description: Double hazy ipa with citra ,strata,mosaic hops , collab with Mikerphone Seven Island Brewery - Phantom of the Hopera
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Hop Massacre (collab Barrel Theory)
item.beer_description: Triple Hazy IPA with Citra ,Hbc630 and Cryo pop ,collab with barrel theory Seven Island Brewery - Hop Massacre

item.title: Forager of the Hop Skulls (collab Forager)
item.beer_description: Triple hazy ipa with Citra ,Cryo Pop and strata hops ,collab with Forager Seven Island Brewery - Forager of the Hop Skulls

item.title: Dimensional Hop Rage (collab Dimensional)
item.beer_description: Double Hazy IPA with Citra ,Simcoe and Cryo pop Seven Island Brewery - Dimensional Hop Rage
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Giotto 2024
item.beer_description: In collaboration with Pasticceria Giotto we made panettone with our beer, Magma Bianco. Then we used the same panettone and created Giotto. Giotto is a flat, non-bubble Pastry Stout, matured for 24 months in chardonnay barrels with a large amount of Panettone. Tricky, oily and obviously tastes like panettone….Giotto. Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. CRAK Brewery - Giotto 2024

item.title: We Sing At Six And A Half
item.beer_description: Over the years, we realised that there is a specific moment in the brewing process where the science stops being just data & process, and starts to feel more like music. And for our head brewer, James, there’s a magic frequency sitting exactly at 6.5% abv. It’s the 'Goldilocks zone' of the Verdant range. The precise ABV where the Verdant style truly begins to sing. To celebrate this sweet spot, we’ve used that special harmony in our newest IPA: We Sing at Six and a Half. Hazy 6.5% IPAs are comfortably in our wheelhouse, but this new one feels like a calibration of everything we love. It pours a beautiful pale golden yellow, it’s hazy as hell and as soft as a fluffy white cloud. Expect a devilishly moreish and precise drinking experience packed with bright citrus & tropical fruits, thanks to a heavy-hitting hop bill of Citra, NZH-101, and Nectaron. What else? Deep, complex 'Verdant' undertones that anchor the fruit with our signature dankness, using our house yeast characteristics. Verdant - We Sing At Six And A Half

item.title: Timing’s End
item.beer_description: Our selected lots of Mac Hops Motueka and Nelson Sauvin are the star of the show here. Grapes, gooseberries and unctuous creamy limes atop a feathery mouthfeel of joy. Verdant - Timings End

item.title: Sideways
item.beer_description: Time isn’t just about moving forward. When the arrow reaches its limit, when we hit Timing’s End, where do we go next? At Verdant, we like to go Sideways! Introducing 'Sideways', the big brother to our Nelson/Motueka superstar Timing's End, an 8% DIPA that takes the same punchy hop profile and expands it into a new dimension. Think of it as a panoramic view of everything you love about the original. By pushing the ABV and the hop dosage, we’ve shifted the perspective. If the IPA is the point of impact, this DIPA is the ripple effect. Verdant - Sideways
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: The Upside Down
item.beer_description: Powerful, citrusy, full-bodied. Engorile - The Upside Down
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Drunked Donuts
item.beer_description: A dense, full-bodied, creamy, and elegant Imperial Stout. Despite its high alcohol content, it's well-integrated thanks to its body and the pastry notes imparted by the addition of donuts during brewing. A smooth, rich beer with chocolatey, nutty, and peanut notes. All this is combined with a dark, dense, opaque appearance and a well-formed brown head. Engorile - Drunked Donuts

item.title: Basqueland Brewing - Triplet
item.beer_description: The Basqueland Brewing - Triplet contains: - Basqueland - GenesisIPA - New England / Hazy | 5,8% | 440 ml - Basqueland - OmnivoreIPA - Other | 6,2% | 440 ml - Basqueland - TopTenIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml

item.title: Riwaka Focus
item.beer_description: Double New England IPA brewed only with Riwaka (Late harvest Eggers hops) Norm - Riwaka Focus
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Reason In Madness (collab Metanoia)
item.beer_description: Roll the can lightly before opening. Do not shake. Fruited sour smoothie made with our friends from Metanoia (Ro) brewed with raspberry and passion fruit purée ! Nothing but fruits puree before canning ! Reason in madness because we wanted to keep it really sour with a nice portion of fruit puree keeping it properly drinkable. Norm - Reason In Madness

item.title: Krush On You
item.beer_description: New England IPA hopped and dry hopped with Krush (50%), Simcoe, Motueka and Citra. A bouquet of fresh citrus, stone fruits, pine resin, woody notes and earthy undertones. Norm - Krush On You

item.title: Every Cloud
item.beer_description: DDH Triple New England IPA : Superdelic Nectaron Waimea Idaho 7 (Dynaboost) Bursting with mainly New Zealand hops line up, Superdelic, super star Nectaron paired with its sister Waimea. Last but not least, Idaho 7 (Dynaboost) is joining for a storm of hops. Load of tropical fruits, berries, red fruits, sweet manguo, citrus, peaches ! Norm - Every Cloud

item.title: Over Seas (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: Collab with Messorem Hops: Citra • Motueka • Riwaka Tasting Notes: Pineapple • Orange Zest • Mango ABV: 7.0% Outer Range - Over Seas

item.title: Ritual Obscure
item.beer_description: Scotch Ale / Wee Heavy aged on Bourbon Oak Chips with Brown Sugar, Cocoa & Vanilla EXP Artisan - Ritual Obscure

item.title: NEIPA DE RIZ (collab La Fosse,Jackalhop)
item.beer_description: New England IPA with Boldness, Lorien, Strata, Strata CGX & Luminous hops Oat and wheat flakes replaced with rice in a flavorful and drinkable NEIPA. Notes of citrus and passion fruit, floral and dank. Emporium - NEIPA DE RIZ

item.title: NZ NEIPA (collab Nano Cinco,Le Ketch)
item.beer_description: Anniversary release. IPA New England with Tropical Fusion, Peacharine & Peacharine Hop Kief hops Big, juicy and saturated NEIPA. Explosion of peach, nectarine and lime zest, punchy finish. Emporium - NZ NEIPA - anniversary release

item.title: De Toute Évidence
item.beer_description: Anniversary release. Barleywine aged 12 months in barrels Jamaican Rum, Apple Brandy & Bourbon An unconventional double mash barleywine, aged for over a year in barrels. The malty base has developed a refined complexity. Warm and surprisingly easy to drink for barleywine lovers. Emporium - De Toute Evidence - anniversary release

item.title: À Fleur De Nuit
item.beer_description: Anniversary release. Inspired by the classic Deadly Sin. Hot brewed with a generous amount of coffee, then recirculated over an obscene amount of Colombian Café des Femmes. More digestible and streamlined than the other BAs in the release Emporium - A Fleur De Nuit - anniversary release

item.title: Macaroon Macaroon (collab The Veil)
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout with Coconut & Vanilla Trillium - Macaroon Macaroon

item.title: Tin Flower (collab Oakflower)
item.beer_description: Tin Flower Brewed in collaboration with Oak Flower Brewing, this hazy IPA is soft, juicy, and beautiful. Citra, Peacharine, Alora, and Motueka deliver layers of bright citrus, ripe peach, and tropical fruit, all wrapped in a smooth, hazy body. Tin Barn - Tin Flower

item.title: Queens Symbology
item.beer_description: New England TIPA collab with Conclave Brewing. Hopped with Citra, Cyro Citra, Cyro Nectron & Superdelic Tin Barn - Queens Symbology

item.title: Garden State Beast (collab Ghost Hawk& Seven Tribesmen)
item.beer_description: Garden State Beast is a bold Double IPA born from a three-way collab with Ghosthawk and 7 Tribesman - stacked with Citra, Mosaic, and Simcoe for a full-on flavor charge. Bursting with juicy citrus, ripe berry, and dank pine, it hits with a smooth haze and a beastly finish that roars from first sip to last. Tin Barn - Garden State Beast
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Gravedigger Billy (2025)
item.beer_description: Our bourbon barrel-aged Wee Heavy, decked out in a fine tartan kilt, delivers expressions of sweet malt and American oak like a furious claymore strike. Pour a wee dram and let the brogue fly. Don’t be daft, enjoy now or store cold. Revolution - Gravedigger Billy (2025)

item.title: Kamo III
item.beer_description: Hops: Galaxy, Crosby Citra, Eggers Riwaka, Spectrum Citra, Freestyle Nelson Sauvin, Freestyle Nelson Sauvin Hop Kief Lolev Beer - Kamo III
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Swish
item.beer_description: Our iconic DIPA combines hand-selected lots of the most aromatic hops in the Pacific Northwest with the best malt grown in New England. Juicy, tropical, lightly bitter, and suavely brash. Bissell Brothers - Swish
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Nothing Gold
item.beer_description: Our Citra-forward DIPA offers a melange of tropical flavors atop a subtle graham cracker-like malt character to balance. Lush, dank, and complex. Nothing Gold can stay. Bissell Brothers - Nothing Gold
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Super Sendy
item.beer_description: Hops: Citra • Mosaic • Nelson Tasting Notes: Huell Melon • Pineapple • Dragon Fruit Outer Range - Super Sendy
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Moonline
item.beer_description: Moonline - Hazy DIPA - In Collaboration with Barthaas Hops: Luna • Galaxy Prisma • Vic Secret Tasting Notes: Mango • Passion Fruits • Pine Outer Range - Moonline
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Deepest Steepest
item.beer_description: Hops: Citra • Citra Cryo • Citra Quantum Tasting Notes: Passion Fruit • Candied Lemon • Tangerine Outer Range - Deepest Steepest

item.title: TORTA
item.beer_description: A chocolate-almond stout, inspired by the famous Italian Torta Caprese rich flourless cake. Tuletorn - TORTA

item.title: Memme Musi
item.beer_description: Apple-rhubarb pie inspired smoothie sour, brewed to celebrate Tuletorn's second birthday. Name means 'grandma's kiss' in Estonian Tuletorn - Memme Musi

item.title: Give the People What They Really Want
item.beer_description: We love making stouts and we love making smoothies, come on, it was only a matter of time. Brewed to celebrate our second birthday. Tuletorn - Give the People What They Really Want

item.title: Cuckoo Sunshine
item.beer_description: Mango-pineapple smoothie sour Tuletorn - Cuckoo Sunshine

item.title: TNT (collab Xul)
item.beer_description: This beer was brewed in collaboration with Xül and dry hopped with Citra, Simcoe, Riwaka and Nelson Sauvin. Canned on the 27th of April 2026. Hoppy People - TNT
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Soul Destroyer (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: This beer was brewed in collaboration with Messorem and dry hopped with Galaxy, Eclipse, Citra, Mosaic and Riwaka. Canned on the 27th of April 2026. Hoppy People - Soul Destroyer

item.title: Hops With Benefits (collab Yakima Chief Hops)
item.beer_description: This beer was brewed in collaboration with Yakima Chief Hops and dry hopped with Citra Cryo, Simcoe Cryo, Mosaic Cryo, Simcoe T90 and Citra Hyperboost. Canned on the 27th of April 2026. Hoppy People - Hops With Benefits
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Extratropical Cyclone (collab Elmeleven)
item.beer_description: This beer was made in collaboration with Elmeleven and contains huge addition of Coconut from Philippines, Mango, Passionfruit and Banana. Hoppy People - Extratropical Cyclone

item.title: Political Flow (collab Obercreek)
item.beer_description: Our first collab with Obercreek and super excited how it came out. We too More Flow ipa and Political Juice and mashed them togeather and this monster was born. Notes of Pineapple, Mango, Papaya, And Cream, (No Lactose Added) District 96 - Political Flow
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Fadewalker
item.beer_description: Bourbon Barrel Aged Imperial Stout with Vanilla Fadewalker is a masterful Barrel Aged Imperial Stout from the German precision brewers at BLECH.BRUT. Known for their tight and technical approach to beer, this time they took the time to age a heavy and complex brew in selected Bourbon barrels. During this process, vanilla was used liberally, creating a silky texture that beautifully softens the robust base of roasted malts. Fadewalker is designed as a "slow sipper," a beer that evolves slowly as it warms up in the glass. Blech.Brut - Fadewalker

item.title: Bless This Mess Vol. 2
item.beer_description: The 2nd volume of our barrel aged cream stout series Barrel - Still Austin Bourbon Adjuncts - condensed milk, coconut cream, coffee (roasted by @yumeroasters ) and dulce de leche ‼️Shake before pouring. Blackout - Bless This Mess Vol. 2

item.title: Bless This Mess Vol 1
item.beer_description: The first volume of our barrel aged cream stout series: Barrel - Chattanooga Tennessee Bourbon Adjuncts - salted caramel ice cream soft serve, coconut cream, condensed milk Shake before pouring. Blackout - Bless This Mess Vol 1

item.title: Bezna - Bourbon BA
item.beer_description: This is the BA version of our collab with Ophiussa. Contains a shitload of pistachio ice cream, coconut cream and condensed milk. ‼️Shake before pouring Blackout - Bezna - Bourbon BA

item.title: VII-DIPA
item.beer_description: Super Sauvin | Nelson Sauvin | Peacherine | Quantum Citra Blackout - VII-DIPA

item.title: VII-CAKE
item.beer_description: 7th Anniversary imperial stout. Barrels: 2 Alberta Rhum 1 Martinique Rhum Adjuncts: roasted Solomon Island cocoa nibs, roasted Iranian pistachios, pistachio extract 1050 bottles in existence. Blackout - VII-CAKE

item.title: VII-BW
item.beer_description: 7th anniversary barleywine. Barrels: 1 x 6th Street Bourbon 1 x Smooth Ambler Rye Whiskey 928 bottles in existence. Blackout - VII-BW

item.title: VII-BLEND
item.beer_description: 7th anniversary blend. Barrels: 1 Kilchoman (slightly peated) 1 MGP bourbon. No adjuncts. 1006 bottles in existence. Blackout - VII-BLEND

item.title: VII-ANTICAKE
item.beer_description: Barrels: 1 x Laird’s Apple Brandy 1 x Still Austin Bourbon Adjuncts: • Coffee - Njemu Estate Kenya beans, custom roasted by Yume for this beer • Madagascar vanilla beans • Toasted and untoasted coconut flakes 912 bottles in existence Blackout - VII-ANTICAKE

item.title: Triple Chemicals
item.beer_description: Super Sauvin | Peacherine Blackout - Triple Chemicals

item.title: Junk Deluxe - Rye Whiskey BA (collab Hophead)
item.beer_description: Maple, chocolate, hazelnut. Batch 1: brewed at Hophead. Batch 2: brewed at our facility. Blackout - Junk Deluxe - Rye Whiskey BA

item.title: Deadly Splendor - Bourbon BA (collab BERE A La CLUJ)
item.beer_description: Batch 2 in cans: Aged in a Tennessee bourbon barrel. Brewed at facility of Blackout. Blackout - Deadly Splendor - Bourbon BA

item.title: FWD (HBC 1183)
item.beer_description: A single hop beer brewed in collaboration with Yakima Chief Ranches and their FWD program. FWD was created as a two-way innovation channel, where products are trialed by the intended users (us the brewers) and feedback is collected and utilized (from YOU, the drinker), which safeguards the investment of farmer partners and provides brewers with tools to expand and evolve their products. Basically it's a hop research program and it's delicious and you get to try it before anyone else! This FWD beer was dry hopped exclusively with a brand new, still unnamed hop, called HBC 1183. It’s a new up and comer that scored high on the unique and fruity side. Let us know what you think! Badlands - FWD 1183

item.title: The Horncackler
item.beer_description: Introducing to you, for its grand debut: The Horncackler! What is a horncackler? Well it’s kind of like a grizzly, but with horns. It has fur that is black, but polar white feet. It has big eyes, big claws and big teeth. It cackles in the night. It’s bigger than a human. It can’t fit in a house. It can break a stick!! It is, the one, the only: Horncackler! Pulled directly from the imagination of a three year old Theo (my son). Hopped with Citra and Peacharine we taste a mix of citrus, nectarine and some rich tropical notes. It’s cacklin’ good Badlands - The Horncackler

item.title: Merci Beaucoup
item.beer_description: Merci beaucoup is a New England Double IPA with Riwaka, Superdelic, and Galaxy hops. A beer distinguished by its smooth texture and ultra-juicy, tropical flavor profile. Nano Cinco - Merci Beaucoup
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Innovation #8
item.beer_description: IPA Triple New England with NZ Rhapzody, CIP 076 & Motueka hops Nano Cinco - Innovation #8

item.title: Gigan
item.beer_description: Gigan is a Quadruple New England IPA that also features Newzilla hops. This is complemented by conventional Citra, Riwaka, and Southern Cross hop pellets, as well as an extra boost of liquid hop by-products: Riwaka Amplifier and Citra Dynaboost. The result is a particularly textured and aromatic beer with explosive notes of citrus zest, mango, and nectarine. Nano Cinco - Gigan

item.title: Si6lings (collab 5e Baron)
item.beer_description: IPA New England with Simcoe, Eureka & Chinook hops Brewed with oats and wheat and then hopped with Eureka, Chinook and hand-selected Simcoe. It's got a tight, foamy head that's really pretty in the glass. Notes of big, red berries, pink raspberry, Swedish Fish candy, kiwi and a lot of sweet orange. In celebration of 6th Anniversary! Third Moon - Si6lings (6th anniversary)

item.title: Crown (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: Crown is an 8% Hazy Double IPA brewed in collab with Messorem. Hopped with Citra, Peacharine, Waimea and Fresh Waimea Cold Pressed Hop Juice from freestylehops. It is creamy and tropical with notes of funky papaya and guava. The cold pressed Waimea gives it a big, bright hop punch that smells like rubbing a pile of fresh hops. Third Moon - Crown (6th anniversary)

item.title: Rest In Hops (collab Nano Cinco,Toltèk)
item.beer_description: Rest In Hops is a 10.5% Triple IPA brewed with oats and hopped with Peacharine, Motueka and Citra that is brewed in a three-way collab with our Nano Cinco and Toltek from Quebec. This is a milky pour with notes of creamy apricot, papaya and lime zest. It drinks like the ABV is much lower with a super clean finish. Third Moon -Rest In Hops (6th anniversary)

item.title: Sextuple Dry Hopped Quadruple Bone Tree
item.beer_description: 11.9% Hazy Quadruple IPA hopped with an unprecedented amount with Citra, Citra Cryo, Citra Hyperboost and Citra Dynaboost. It is absolutely bursting with tropical fruit and citrus notes thanks to the largest dry hop. Third Moon - Sextuple Dry Hopped Quadruple Bone Tree (6th anniversary)

item.title: Destructio 0007
item.beer_description: IPA Double New England with Riwaka, Nelson Sauvin & Kohia Nelson Hop Kief hops Messorem - Destructio #0007
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Conquest: Death (collab Twin Elephant,Esker Hart,Autodidact)
item.beer_description: IPA Double New England with Eggers Nelson Sauvin, Anchovy, Citra, Citra Cryo, Citra Dynaboost & Nelson Hop Kief hops. Notes of lychee, pineapple, passion fruit, white grape, pink grapefruit, and a very smooth herbal base. Each brewery has its own signature style, but they all deliver a unanimous burst of flavor 💀 Messorem - Conquest: Death
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Cassiopée
item.beer_description: IPA Quadruple with pESHarine, Rakau, Nelson Sauvin, Citra & Kohia Nelson hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Cassiopee

item.title: Double Goshawk (collab Horus Aged Ales)
item.beer_description: Inspired by the Northern Goshawk Imperial Stout they released together in the winter of 2020, this version takes everything up a notch, featuring ridiculous additions of chopped hazelnuts, Trillium Blend Barrington Coffee, and Madagascar vanilla, resulting in an intensely rich stout built for holiday celebration. Pouring a deep brown with a caramel-tinged head, Double Goshawk immediately offers a profoundly nutty aroma. Notes of dark chocolate, freshly roasted coffee, molasses, and brown sugar fill the senses. A full, creamy body with medium sweetness is balanced by a subtle roast and a touch of warming alcohol, making each sip supremely satisfying and complex. Trillium - Double Goshawk

item.title: Congress Street
item.beer_description: Our flagship American IPA highlights the distinctively aromatic Australian Galaxy hop. The nose bursts with pine, citrus rind, melon and pineapple. Pronounced flavors of peach, clementine, and tropical fruits are accentuated with moderate bitterness and balanced by a light, biscuity malt character. Trillium - Congress Street

item.title: Big Bird
item.beer_description: Our 'small birds' are a series of pale ales experimenting with combinations of adjunct grains and hop varieties to create seasonal, sessionable pale ales. Big Bird is a continuation of some of these experiments in an amped-up Double IPA form. One of the hoppiest beers we've made to date, Big Bird is featuring a new signature hop. This new hop gives Big Bird an intense nose that zaps the senses with aromas of lime, overripe papaya, and pithy citrus. Flavors of pineapple and tangy grapefruit are balanced by a light body and dank, resinous finish. Pumped up with hop forward flavor... there's a new bird in town, and this clucker is big! Trillium - Big Bird
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Triple Pixel
item.beer_description: Our core hazy to the max - Triple Pixel satisfies the haziest of cravings. This 10% triple IPA is triple dry-hopped with 100% Citra hops for big, bold notes of lime peel, tropical passion fruit, and pulpy grapefruit. Phase Three - Triple Pixel

item.title: Pixel
item.beer_description: Pixel Density is now Pixel - our flagship hazy IPA with 100% citra hops for notes of lime peel, passion fruit, and pulpy grapefruit. Phase Three - Pixel

item.title: Double Pixel
item.beer_description: Our flagship hazy IPA, times two! This hazy double IPA has been double dry-hopped with our favorite 100% Citra hops. Enjoy dank notes of lime peel, tropical passion fruit, and pulpy grapefruit on our fluffy, hazy base. Phase Three - Double Pixel
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Odonata
item.beer_description: Odonata is a New England IPA made entirely with New Zealand hops. Hopped with Peacharine, Rakau and NZ Cascade cultivars from our Freestyle Hops selection, it bursts with expressive stone fruit aromas and boasts a rich, ultra-silky body. Nano Cinco - Odonata

item.title: Whams Above Whams Below (collab Prison City)
item.beer_description: This Imperial Coffee Stout is brewed in collaboration with Prison City Pub and Brewery. We have blended our base As Above recipe with Prison City's Wham Whams recipe and conditioned the beer on a fan favorite coffee, toasted coconut, and Tahitian vanilla. A smooth body is met with a barrage of coffee, coconut, rum, pecans, creamy vanilla, and dark chocolate. Mortalis - Whams Above Whams Below

item.title: Hydra | Pineapple + Strawberry + Coconut
item.beer_description: This Fruited Sour blends pineapple, strawberry, and coconut together to form just one of this monster’s many heads. Keep your eyes peeled for even more flavor combinations. Mortalis - Hydra | Pineapple + Strawberry + Coconut

item.title: Voyage Au Centre De La Terre
item.beer_description: Double India Pale with Peachrine, Citra & Galaxy hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Voyage Au Centre De La Terre

item.title: Tempestas
item.beer_description: Triple IPA with Citra, Southern Cross, Ella & Citra Incognito hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Tempestas

item.title: HYPA #9
item.beer_description: Double Dry Hopped India Pale Ale with Citra & Vic Secret hops. Brasserie du Bas-Canada - HYPA #9

item.title: Actias Prime
item.beer_description: Prime means: In its original form. But metamorphosis is inevitable, natural, bright, and full of life. Actias Prime is a massive Triple IPA hopped with Strata and Strata CGX Nuvo, un-kilned whole cones flash-frozen at harvest to capture fresh hops at their most vibrant. This process locks in pure passion fruit intensity and juicy hop character. No brightness is lost between the farm and fermentation. Bold, saturated, and bursting with tropical fruit. From earth to glass, this is fresh hops fully realized, bursting with the kind of fruity notes that only happen when you capture nature at its prime. 9.6% ABV Parish - Actias Prime

item.title: Crashing the Boards (collab Short Throw)
item.beer_description: A hazy Imperial IPA dunked with a shattering amount of hand-selected hops giving notes of peach-apricot nectar, pineapple concentrate, and lychee. Brewed with: Citra, Vista, Peacharine, Citra Cryo Other Half - Crashing the Boards
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Rubicon
item.beer_description: RUBICON Imperial stout – 12 % Yops : Cacahuète / Noisette / Cacao RUBICON is a massive, velvety stout that hits hard from the first sip. Waves of roasted peanut, toasted hazelnut, and deep cocoa roll across the palate. Dark, rich, and dangerously smooth. 12% of pure liquid darkness. Prizm - Rubicon

item.title: Limgrave
item.beer_description: Big, ultra-juicy DIPA balanced with two of our favorite NZ hops: Nelson Sauvin x Riwaka. Explosion of tropical fruits: pineapple, mango, passion fruit, peach and grapefruit. A light pine resin to finish cleanly. ⚠️ 8% that goes down (a little too) easily… Excessive alcohol consumption is dangerous for your health, consume in moderation. Prizm - Limgrave
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: End of All We Know (collab Dry & Bitter)
item.beer_description: After a first collaboration in 2023 at their's we finally invited our dear friends from Dry & Bitter, Copenhagen to come and brew at ours. As a result, we are found with a massive Triple NEIPA (or DDH TIPA as you wish), with Citra T90, Cryo and Hyperboost & Nelson Sauvin Cryo, Bliss Process and Subzero Hop Kief from Freestyle Hops Thick, juicy, citrusy, graprefruity, and Nelsony, whatever that may mean. Cheers ! Prizm - End of All We Know

item.title: Quelque Chose Qui Danse En Toi
item.beer_description: This Double NEIPA is a return to our roots for Fauve. After numerous collaborations with international breweries that challenged us on our dry-hopping techniques, we've finally been able to combine our learning in this beer, pushing the exotic flavors of Nectaron, Citra, and Sabro to the extreme. The result: an incredibly intense aroma of fresh pineapple, ripe mango, and coconut. Enjoy! Fauve - Quelque Chose Qui Danse En Toi

item.title: Où Chante Une Rivière
item.beer_description: This beer is a blend of an Imperial Stout aged for 30 months in French whisky barrels with a younger Imperial Pastry Stout aged in bourbon barrels. After blending, a comforting and indulgent twist was added with a cocoa and tonka bean finish! Fauve - Ou Chante Une Riviere

item.title: Les Lilas S'en Vont
item.beer_description: We rigorously selected our finest Imperial Stout Bourbon casks to blend them into a pure, unadulterated blend. This showcases the very best of what Fauve has to offer in terms of Imperial Stout Bourbon. The whisky was aged for 25 months in Bourbon barrels. Fauve - Les Lilas S'en Vont

item.title: L'Éveil Des Géants
item.beer_description: We worked on the malt bill of this Double NEIPA DDH as a marriage of barley, oats and wheat capable of creating a smooth and indulgent body, on the basis of which the hops can express themselves as if by magic: the Nelson Sauvin releases its white grape thiols, on which the exoticism of Mosaic and Sabro combines wonderfully! Fauve - L'Eveil Des Geants

item.title: L'Or Du Soir
item.beer_description: This beer is a blend of an Imperial Stout aged for 30 months in French whisky barrels and a young Barley White aged for 4 months in Bourbon barrels. After blending, we infused beautiful vanilla pods to add a rich, smooth flavor to this blend! Fauve - L'Or Du Soir

item.title: Hommage aux Cent Ponts (collab Stu Mostów)
item.beer_description: This beer is the result of a collaboration with our Polish friends at Browar Stu Mostów. Its name, "Homage to the Hundred Bridges," is a nod to their city of Wrocław, the "Polish Venice." Brewed for the 2026 edition of Beer Geek Madness, this beer features three iconic hops: Nectaron, Galaxy, and Simcoe, which together develop delicious notes of juicy pineapple and passion fruit, with a wonderfully resinous finish. Fauve - Hommage aux Cent Ponts
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Double Black Mash (2026) Original
item.beer_description: Brewed with the motto: "Only malt, no bullshit". All Grain Double Mash Imperial Stout Amager Bryghus - Double Black Mash (2026) Original

item.title: Double Black Mash (2026) Maple Syrup Barrel Aged Edition
item.beer_description: Aged for 10 months in ex-bourbon oak barrels that previously contained maple syrup. Amager Bryghus - Double Black Mash (2026) Maple Syrup Barrel Aged Edition

item.title: Ārpus X Sudden Death QDH Riwaka X Strata X Nelson Sauvin TIPA (collab Sudden Death)
item.beer_description: Arpus - Arpus X Sudden Death QDH Riwaka X Strata X Nelson Sauvin TIPA

item.title: TDH Hand-Selected Riwaka DIPA
item.beer_description: Ārpus Brewing Co. presents a bold, hop-driven Double IPA - Hand-Selected Riwaka DIPA. This beer is brewed with Riwaka hops we personally selected in New Zealand last year, choosing each lot ourselves during hop harvest. Expect an intense burst of passionfruit, grapefruit, and fresh citrus, wrapped in a soft, juicy body with a saturated hop profile. A true showcase of one of New Zealand’s most expressive hop varieties. Arpus - TDH Hand-Selected Riwaka DIPA
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Portuguese Brandy Barrel Aged Imperial Stout
item.beer_description: This Imperial Stout was aged for 12 months in Portuguese brandy barrels from Lourinhã. Lourinhã Brandy is a DOC-protected spirit, much like Cognac or Armagnac — but uniquely Portuguese. The result is a rich and complex stout with deep roasted malt character, layered with elegant brandy warmth, subtle oak, dried fruit notes, and a smooth, lingering finish. A beer made for slow sipping and special moments. Arpus - Portuguese Brandy Barrel Aged Imperial Stout

item.title: Hazelnut X Chocolate X Vanilla Imperial Stout
item.beer_description: A deep, full-bodied Imperial Stout layered with roasted malt character and smooth sweetness. Rich chocolate leads the way, followed by toasted hazelnut and soft vanilla, creating a creamy, dessert-like experience with a long, satisfying finish. Indulgent, smooth, and made for slow enjoyment. Arpus - Hazelnut X Chocolate X Vanilla Imperial Stout

item.title: Apple X Banana X Mango X Vanilla Smoothie Sour Ale
item.beer_description: A smooth and creamy blend where crisp apple meets ripe banana and tropical mango, rounded out with soft vanilla sweetness. Arpus - Apple X Banana X Mango X Vanilla Smoothie Sour Ale

item.title: Good Morning Pineapple (Looking Very Good, Very Nice) (collab Hop Hooligans)
item.beer_description: For some mysterious reason, stringing together a couple of rhymes about tropical fruits on top of catchy percussion rhythms, causes, almost indubitably, to almost everyone, a rush of joyful emotions that may lead to uncontrollable humming and body moving. Some made careers out of this rather straightforward recipe. Now take one of these musical motifs and put it on top of a reel, one that preferably involves cats. Now that's the kind of online brainrot we happily indulge in. Good morning, to the Watermelon Juicy juicy sugar lemon tingalingaling tingalingalingaling Maktoob - Good Morning Pineapple (Looking Very Good, Very Nice)

item.title: Trench Coat Contraband
item.beer_description: Water, Barley malt (Golden Promise, Heidelberg), Wheat malt (Heidelberg Wheat), Oat Flakes, Hops (McKenzie, Hand Selected Citra, Chinook, Columbus), Yeast (BRY-97) Hop Hooligans - Trench Coat Contraband

item.title: Lost Carcosa
item.beer_description: Water, Barley malt, Wheat malt, Oat flakes, Chit malt, Hops (Pacifica, Citra, Cryo Pop, Super Sauvin), Yeast (London Ale III, Anchor Alchemy II). Hop Hooligans - Lost Carcosa
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Fortunio
item.beer_description: Water, Barley Malt, Wheat Malt, Oat Flakes, Hops (Hand Selected El Dorado, Mega Motueka), Yeast (London Ale III) Hop Hooligans - Fortunio

item.title: Underrated
item.beer_description: This 8.3% Hazy DIPA is an absolute tropical surprise. The hop blend is particularly interesting: Riwaka provides bright passion fruit and citrus, while the related duo Sabro and Talus add a completely unique, almost creamy dimension of coconut, pink grapefruit, and floral notes. The result is a heavy, lush fruit bomb that absolutely should not be underrated. Anagram - Underrated

item.title: DARK MATTER
item.beer_description: It is a massive, heavy, and unprecedentedly dark brew. By aging the beer in oak, the already robust base of roasted malts gains an extra, luxurious dimension. The wood imparts complex tannins and soft vanilla notes that blend perfectly with the warmth of the alcohol. This is a magnificent cellaring beer to sip in peace. Anagram - DARK MATTER

item.title: You Won’t Believe It’s Not Crumble! (collab Sudden Death)
item.beer_description: Brought to you with our pals at Sudden Death Brewing Co., this smoothie sour is fresh out the oven. Jam packed with unfermented cherries, strawberries plums and apples, then layered with cinnamon warmth and pastry sweetness. “I genuinely can’t believe it’s not crumble!” – Joe Cruickshank, Sour Beer Enthusiast. Sour Scale:3 Allergens: Malted Barley & Oats (Gluten) Vault City - You Wont Believe Its Not Crumble!

item.title: Caramel Eggs
item.beer_description: Our latest imperial stout was inspired by the sweet taste of a certain chocolate caramel egg... With each sip there’s a velvety texture among layers of intense chocolate and smooth caramel. Through an extended boil we’ve dialled those Maillard reactions into overdrive, encapsulating the unique gooey goodness and caramelised sweetness in a decadent dessert stout. Vault City - Caramel Eggs

item.title: PB&J Mixtape: Grape
item.beer_description: Peanut Butter & Jelly Gluten-Free Sour. Straight from your childhood. Xul - PB&J Mixtape: Grape

item.title: Three Layers (2026)
item.beer_description: Blend of Imperial Stouts aged for 12 and 16 months in bourbon barrels then conditioned on Ghanaian cocoa nibs, coconut flakes, Madagascar vanilla beans, and estate-grown toasted pecans. Three Layers is a liquid tribute to my grandmothers cake recipe. She used to make me a three-layered German Chocolate Cake every year for my birthday. It was, and still is, my favorite. It only felt right to make this an annual tradition at the brewery, releasing Three Layers every year around my birthday, March 1st. Millpond - Three Layers (2026)

item.title: LongStory : Chapter 3
item.beer_description: For the next chapter of our Imperial Stout collaboration series with our friend Erik Busch at LongStory Coffee we took inspiration from popular coffee drinks at his cafe. LongStory Chapter 3 is a Caffè Mocha-inspired Imperial Stout aged for over 15 months in a Switchgrass Spirits Bourbon barrel. It was then conditioned on LongStory barrel-aged coffee, which was aged in a used Millpond Imperial Stout barrel, and Tanzanian cocoa nibs. Millpond - LongStory : Chapter 3

item.title: Fading Hours
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout with Coffee, Chocolate, and Maple Syrup False Hope - Fading Hours

item.title: Wandering Into the Fog (Galaxy) (collab Twelve Percent Beer Project)
item.beer_description: Brewed with a heavy wheat and oat malt bill, hopped and double dry hopped aggressively with 7+lbs per bbl of Mosaic, Pacific Jade, Citra, Summit and a ton of Galaxy! Fluffy, pillowy, juicy, dank, DDH goodness. Abomination - Wandering Into the Fog (Galaxy)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Rotting Earth (2026)
item.beer_description: The 2025 edition is a 9.3% Double Dry-Hopped DIPA, dry hopped with Mosaic, Nelson, El Dorado, Citra, Columbus, and Galaxy. Abomination - Rotting Earth (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Maiden 2025
item.beer_description: Maiden is our Anniversary celebration, a blend of barley wine aged in a multitude of barrels sourced from the finest wine and spirit producers worldwide. Each year's vintage is unique, so see below to learn more about the blend within this bottle. Barrel Blend: Rum 23%, Tequila 12%, Rye 10%, Bourbon 9%, Red Wine 7%, Banyuls 7%, Port 7%, Cognac 6%, Fresh 19%. Siren Craft Brew - Siren Maiden '25

item.title: Valhall Hiernagla Whisky Cask
item.beer_description: A barley wine brewed using birch sap. Birch sap gives a unique flavor and this is amplified after maturation in whisky barrels from Hiernagla Distillery in Norway. RYGR Brygghus - Valhall Hiernagla Whisky Cask

item.title: Valhall Hiernagla Peated Whisky Cask
item.beer_description: A barley wine brewed using birch sap. Birch sap gives a unique flavor and this is amplified after maturation in whisky barrels from Hiernagla Distillery in Norway. RYGR Brygghus - Valhall Hiernagla Peated Whisky Cask

item.title: Ziemia Obiecana - Quartet
item.beer_description: The Ziemia Obiecana - Quartet contains: - SmuteczkiSour - Smoothie / Pastry | 5,5% | 500 ml - YeastmodeIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 7% | 500 ml - When In PragueIPA - Milkshake | 7% | 500 ml - KruszynkaIPA - Triple | 9% | 500 ml Ziemia Obiecana - Quartet

item.title: Browar Bytow - Creation
item.beer_description: Pastry Stout with Vanilla and Maple Syrup. Creation is the delectable variant enriched with luscious vanilla and rich maple syrup. A thick, heavy dessert at 10.0% alcohol that evokes memories of the heyday of Maltgarden. The beer flows into the glass like pitch-black, thick motor oil, topped with a dark, mocha-colored head. As soon as you take a sniff, you imagine yourself in an American diner: the intense, sweet scent of maple syrup clashes brilliantly with warm, creamy vanilla and dark chocolate. On the palate, this Imperial Stout feels bizarrely full, syrupy, and opulent. The sweetness of the syrup and vanilla is fantastically balanced by the robust, roasted malt base and the heartwarming 10.0% alcohol. A liquid breakfast dessert. Browar Bytow - Special Series: Creation

item.title: Browar Bytow - Momentum
item.beer_description: Pastry stout with peanut butter. Momentum is the decadent peanut butter variant. It is a massive, syrupy 10.0% dessert beer that flawlessly revives the heyday of the renowned Maltgarden stouts. The beer flows into your glass like thick, opaque motor oil, topped with a dark brown head. The aroma is an absolute dream for those with a sweet tooth: intense aromas of freshly roasted peanuts blend with luscious dark chocolate, immediately bringing to mind a liquid Reese's Peanut Butter Cup. On the palate, this Imperial Stout feels unimaginably full, thick, and syrupy. The rich, sweet chocolate flavor is fantastically balanced by the subtle, savory saltiness of the peanut butter and the robust, warming kick of 10.0% alcohol. Browar Bytow - Momentum

item.title: Browar Bytow - Promotion
item.beer_description: Pastry Stout with Hazelnuts. Promotion is the tropical, decadent variant in this series, richly endowed with coconut. It is a heavy, syrupy dessert beer at 10.0% that immediately revives the magic of Maltgarden. The beer flows into the glass like thick, jet-black motor oil and develops a dark, mocha-colored head. The aroma is irresistible: a massive wave of sweet, roasted coconut wafts towards you, beautifully interwoven with deep notes of dark chocolate and roasted malt. It immediately brings to mind a luxurious, liquid Bounty bar. On the palate, this Imperial Stout feels bizarrely full, lush, and syrupy. The sweet, creamy coconut flavor is masterfully balanced by a light bitter touch from the dark malt and the warming, robust base of 10.0% alcohol. Browar Bytow - Promotion

item.title: Browar Bytow - Reality
item.beer_description: Pastry Stout with Hazelnuts. A heavy, syrupy dessert beer with 10.0% alcohol that liquefies the glory days of Maltgarden. The beer flows into the glass like thick, pitch-black motor oil and is topped with a deep brown, mocha-colored head. The aroma is a dream for every praline lover: a massive, luscious waft of freshly roasted hazelnuts blends seamlessly with warm dark chocolate and roasted malt. The liquid equivalent of a luxury hazelnut truffle or decadent hazelnut paste. On the palate, this Imperial Stout is bizarrely full, creamy, and syrupy. The sweet, nutty flavors are perfectly kept in check by the robust malts and the heartwarming 10.0% alcohol. Browar Bytow - Reality

item.title: BBA Chinchilla
item.beer_description: Bourbon Barrel Aged Imperial Stout w/ Hazelnut, Cacao Nibs, & Vanilla Commonwealth - BBA Chinchilla

item.title: Night Cap Cuvee
item.beer_description: A blend inspired by the last pour of the night, Goose Island Night Cap Cuvée captures that feeling through a blend of bourbon barrel-aged stout finished in Cognac, Porto, Rivesaltes, Pineau Blanc and Sherry casks. Expressive layers of dried fruit, moody oak and gentle warmth create moments worth savoring long after the evening ends. Goose Island - Night Cap Cuvee

item.title: Augustin
item.beer_description: Imperial rye stout matured in 5-year-old whisky barrels from Vice & Vertu Jackalhop - Augustin

item.title: Néréide #2 (collab Nano Cinco)
item.beer_description: Nano Cinco X Brasserie du Bas Canada - Manilita, Nelson Sauvin & Riwaka Hops - 473ml Be warned, this Triple IPA is fire! We brewed a big, hoppy beer with our friends at Nano Cinco for this new Néréide release! This Triple IPA features Manilita, Nelson Sauvin, and Riwaka hops. You'll find superb notes of tropical fruit, nectarine, and various hints of citrus zest! Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Nereide #2

item.title: Dark Pyramid (collab GLASS PYRAMID)
item.beer_description: Triple IPA, dry hopped with Citra, Riwaka, Bru-1 Lupomax, and Talus Cryo. Brewed in collaboration with GLASS PYRAMID out of Helsinki, Finland. Known for their over the top smoothy sours, we wanted to channel those fruity, tropical vibes into an elegant triple IPA. Triples are rich and full, finishing with a balanced sweetness and big tropical hop notes of pineapple, coconut, and passionfruit. Finback - Dark Pyramid

item.title: Same Team
item.beer_description: IPA New England with Nelson Sauvin & Moutere hops Finback - Same Team

item.title: Crème De La Crème (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: We have another great collaboration beer for this week! Introducing Crème de la Crème, a double collaboration brewed with our friends at Messorem. We went all out to make this beer super hoppy. The result is incredibly aromatic with notes of tropical fruit sorbet, passion fruit, and a good dose of "dank." Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Creme De La Creme
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Destructio 0006
item.beer_description: IPA Double New England with Peacharine Hop Kief, Peacharine, Citra, Nelson Sauvin Messorem - Destructio #0006
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Temporalis 0055
item.beer_description: IPA Triple New England with Superdelic, Citra, Galaxy & Galaxy Liquid Lupulin hops Messorem - Temporalis #0055

item.title: Temporalis 0054
item.beer_description: Triple New England IPA with Nelson Sauvin, Riwaka, Citra, Mosaic & Mosaic Incognito hops Messorem - Temporalis #0054

item.title: The Deep
item.beer_description: The Deep is a brand new 8% Hazy Double IPA we've brewed with oats and hopped with the sublime combo of Peacharine and Southern Cross. We taste juicy peaches, bright lemon, Paloma cocktail and a touch of resinous pine on the finish. Third Moon - The Deep
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: V
item.beer_description: Double IPA with all Citra hops Wax Wings - V
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Patience, Reflection, Humility- Rye
item.beer_description: Like last year's bourbon barrel-aged version, this bottle contains three difterent Rye Whiskey Barrel-Aged stouts blended to taste. One high-gravity sweet stout (Buffalo Trace Rye- 13 months), one 'modern, balanced Stout' (Heaven Hill Rye- 19 months), and a third more classic Russian Imperial-style Stout (Wild Turkey Rye- 15 months). The result is layered and complex: bittersweet cocoa, molasses, toasted rye bread crust, and warm baking spice. The finish is long, smooth, and well spirited - rye spice lingering over dark chocolate, buoyed by soft intertwined roasted notes. Wax Wings - Patience, Reflection, Humility- Rye

item.title: NFINITY
item.beer_description: the ultimate exploration of the complete Nazareth family; playing with elements of every beer we’ve released in the line-up so far, we isolated our favorite notes and attempted to enhance and compliment them using everything we’ve learned from the past year Wax Wings - NFINITY

item.title: Condor Valley Stuffed French Toast (SFT)
item.beer_description: “Stuffed French Toast inspired fruit sour. Featuring strawberry, blueberry, raspberry, cheesecake, vanilla, milk sugar and cereal” Wax Wings - Condor Valley Stuffed French Toast (SFT)

item.title: Triple We Are Each Other
item.beer_description: Brewed with oats and absolutely jammed with the inclusive combination of Nectaron, Superdelic, Citra and Mosaic. It is the first time we've made a Triple version of our We Are Each Other DIPA recipe. We taste stone fruit, mixed berries and Juicy Fruit gum leaping out of the glass! Third Moon - Triple We Are Each Other

item.title: Barrel Aged From Underneath (2026)
item.beer_description: Barrel Aged From Underneath is an 11.5% ABV imperial chocolate porter that's been aged for 12 months in Buffalo Trace bourbon barrels. In past, this beer has been awarded the best Barrel Aged Imperial Porter in Canada and this batch is tasting as good as ever! As much as we love our big, thick stouts in barrels we found the medium-bodied porter pulls more complex bourbon flavours out from the barrels. We are absolutely in love with this one! Third Moon - Barrel Aged From Underneath (2026)

item.title: Feu Follet
item.beer_description: Smoked Scotch Ale aged for 18 months in rye whiskey barrels Jackalhop - Feu Follet

item.title: Reserve Rye Bourbon County Brand Stout (2019)
item.beer_description: Our Reserve Bourbon County Stout releases showcase how a premium single source bourbon barrel can influence the nuances and flavors of our original BCS.The 2019 Reserve Rye is aged in 100% Rittenhouse Rye barrels - lovingly referred to as 'the bartender's favorite' rye. Rittenhouse's Barrels had a unique effect on the original imperial stout, imparting flavors of fruit and spice. Reserve Rye accentuates all that makes Rittenhouse and Bourbon County unique. Goose Island - Reserve Rye Bourbon County Brand Stout (2019)

item.title: Vacuum Sealed
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Citra, Nectaron, Superdelic, Nelson Bliss, and then conditioned on oranges. DankHouse - Vacuum Sealed

item.title: Triple Beam Dream
item.beer_description: Clearly, we're the triple beam dream. One thousand grams of uncut hops to the gut. We hopped up this Biggie with Citra, Galaxy, and Nectaron. DankHouse - Triple Beam Dream

item.title: Double Dose of Superdelic
item.beer_description: 21 years of age and over. Take down a few glasses every couple of hours, or as needed. Side effects will include happiness, having a great time with friends, relaxation, and peacefulness. Dry hopped with all SuperDelic. DankHouse - Double Dose of Superdelic
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Dream Taker (collab Brasserie Sir John)
item.beer_description: Hazy Double IPA w/ Peacharine, Southern Cross, Riwaka & Maui Nelson Hop Kief brewed in collaboration w/ Sir John Bright and punchy, brimming with flavours of ripe papaya, peach, cantaloupe, lychee and passionfruit with a silky mouthfeel. Counterpart - Dream Taker
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Méliades
item.beer_description: DDH India Pale Ale with Citra, Vic Secret, Galaxy & Enigma hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Meliades

item.title: Mirage
item.beer_description: Double IPA with Citra, Mosaic & Sabro hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Mirage

item.title: WAR REQUIEM
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout aged in Scotch Whisky casks. The most intense battle comes to your cup Laugar - WAR REQUIEM

item.title: AUPA TOVARISCH XI ANNIVERSARY
item.beer_description: They are back with a very special edition of their most iconic beer, their Aupa Tovarisch 11th Anniversary. Laugar - AUPA TOVARISCH XI ANNIVERSARY

item.title: Naked 2025 (collab Kingpin)
item.beer_description: After endless experiments - which is not bad in itself - beer sometimes gets lost behind an incredible number of additives. Therefore, in the winter, when our colleagues from Kingpin visited us, we decided to do an experiment and brew an imperial stout without lactose, without fruit, without strange yeast and other sprinkles. Clean, unclouded taste. Nothing superfluous. Varvar Brew - Naked 2025

item.title: Ghost Elephant 2025
item.beer_description: The second release of Ghost Elephant Imperial Stout. We aged it again in a cask from Caol Ila - peated Scotch whisky from the island of Islay. But this time, the whisky was not mixed with red wine, but with noble Oloroso Sherry. The aroma is delicately smoky, with notes of iodine, seaweed, prunes, raisins and wood. The taste is soft, balanced, with a slight sweetness and a deep aftertaste. Varvar Brew - Ghost Elephant 2025

item.title: White Dog Brewery - White Dog Pair #2
item.beer_description: The White Dog Brewery - Pair contains: - Cookie & CreamStout - Imperial / Pastry | 11% | 440 ml - Rocky Road (2026)Stout - Imperial / Pastry | 11% | 440 ml White Dog Brewery - White Dog Pair #2

item.title: Ovni
item.beer_description: Ovni is a blend of barley wine and stout, aged for 16 months in rye whiskey casks from the MGP Ingredients distillery. The result is a rich, dark beer with aromas of caramel and roasted coffee. The cask also imparts subtle notes of oak, vanilla, spices, and dried fruit. Nano Cinco - Ovni

item.title: Mission Lune
item.beer_description: Mission Lune is a blend of an imperial stout aged for 16 months in a Barton 1792 bourbon cask and an imperial stout aged for 12 months in a Vermont oak rye whiskey cask from the Caledonia Spirit distillery. The beer has a deep black color, a syrupy texture, chocolate aromas, and pronounced spirit notes reminiscent of toffee, tobacco, and toasted oak. Nano Cinco - Mission Lune

item.title: BA Still Toasted After All These Years
item.beer_description: A blend of Imperial Stouts loaded with oats, debittered Black Malts, and Burnt Sugar. Aged in Buffalo Trace Bourbon Barrels for 14 months. Conditioned on vanilla, toasted caramel, and both raw and toasted coconut. Blended to celebrate our 9th Anniversary! Icarus - BA Still Toasted After All These Years

item.title: Key Bump (2026)
item.beer_description: Clean off your mirrored glass table and grab a hundo. Key Bump bout to pack your nose full of those oh-so tropical tones. Passionfruit, guava, pineapple(s), calamansi and kumquat barrel down the mountain as quick as Alberto Tomba on an Olympic qualifying run. Hopped with the most dangerous weapon in the game (ElMoMoCoe) + fermented w/ the fruity flyboi Orenthal, Key Bump's the pick-me-up you can't put down. To quote the great Clyde Von Damme, 'What the hell is Dim Mak?' 2026 version of Hoof Hearted - Key Bump (2026)

item.title: TØNNE TROLL (collab LERVIG)
item.beer_description: Brewed with Norway’s acclaimed Lervig, this stout was built on a hearty malt bill with rolled oats and aged a year in Pikesville rye whiskey barrels. Dark, rich, and mischievous, Tønne Troll (“barrel troll”) channels Nordic folklore through Firestone Walker craft. Firestone Walker - TNNE TROLL

item.title: Backcountry Trail
item.beer_description: DIPA with citra, evergreen, mosaic, superdelic Finback - Backcountry Trail

item.title: Strange Beast (collab Nano Cinco)
item.beer_description: Hazy Triple IPA w/ Nelson Bliss, Superdelic & Southern Cross brewed in collaboration w/ Nano Cinco Tropical nectar, chock full of juicy cantaloupe, peach, lychee, sauv blanc and passionfruit with an ultra lush, creamy mouthfeel. Counterpart - Strange Beast

item.title: Dead Sea 2 (collab Le Ketch)
item.beer_description: Hazy IPA w/ Nelson Sauvin, Peacharine, Motueka & Peacharine Hop Kief brewed in collaboration w/ Le Ketch Full and creamy, bursting with fresh nectarine and peach, white grape, lemon-lime candy, passionfruit and pineapple juice. Counterpart - Dead Sea 2

item.title: Lolev - Luminis (Brasserie du Bas-Canada collab) (collab Lolev Beer)
item.beer_description: Collaboration met Lolev Beer - Double IPA met hop: Nelson Sauvin, Riwaka, Motueka, Citra & Maui Nelson Hop Kief Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Luminis: Lolev - Luminis: Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Luminis

item.title: HYPA #6
item.beer_description: India Pale Ale met hops Citra & Simcoe Brasserie du Bas-Canada - HYPA #6

item.title: Double Dry Hopped #GatineauIsTrending
item.beer_description: Double Dry Hopped version of #GatineauIsTrending with Galaxy, Nelson Sauvin & Citra hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Double Dry Hopped #GatineauIsTrending

item.title: Zombie HWhip: Blood Orange Raspberry Lemonade
item.beer_description: A bright, brain-freezing blast of undead, refreshment. Zombie Hwhip: Blood Orange Raspberry Lemonade takes our zombie berliner base and overloads it with juicy blood orange, tart raspberry, and zesty lemonade. Heavily fruited, tangy, and wildly refreshing, this sour balances sweet citrus punch with a mouthwatering bite that refuses to stay dead. Beer Zombies - Zombie HWhip: Blood Orange Raspberry Lemonade

item.title: Sticky (2026)
item.beer_description: Citrus, Rice & Maple Syrup 2026 version of All My Friends - Sticky (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Stars & Satellites - Beurre d'arachide (2026)
item.beer_description: It's back to comfort beers at EXP! Our Imperial Sweet Stout Double Mash is finally back. This time, it's been left in the heat for 24 hours before fermentation to concentrate the flavors. We've put all our effort into offering you a delicious, well-balanced beer with enough complexity to stand up to the residual sugar. And it's all topped off with a generous dose of peanuts, creating the perfect peanut butter and dark chocolate dessert. EXP Artisan - Stars & Satellites - Beurre d'arachide (2026)

item.title: #Hautes-Plaines Is Trending
item.beer_description: Quadruple IPA with Nelson Sauvin, Riwaka, Southern Cross, Rakau & Waimea hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - #Hautes-Plaines Is Trending

item.title: Maktoob Brewing - Pair
item.beer_description: The Maktoob Brewing - Pair contains: - Abduction In the DesertIPA - Imperial / Double | 8% | 440 ml - Double Happiness : Earth RoosterIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml Maktoob Brewing - Pair

item.title: Rêve Cosmique
item.beer_description: Here's a DDH NEIPA with an aromatic profile leaning towards citrusy and tropical freshness, driven by an intense combination of Mosaic, Idaho 7, and Citra hops. This "Cosmic Dream," brewed to coincide with the release of the graphic novel "Ariane Rêve," reveals a silky body and a distinctly hazy appearance, developing notes of exotic fruits and pink grapefruit from this galaxy of hops. It's a journey to infinity, a pure cosmic nectar to be savored in moderation. Fauve - Reve Cosmique

item.title: Quatrième Dimension
item.beer_description: Buckle up... Here's our very first Quadruple NEIPA DDH! We've literally pushed the boundaries of hoppy beers with this hazy & juicy monster saturated with Mosaic, Simcoe, Strata, and Nectaron. Powered by a malty base rich in wheat and oats, it explodes with tropical and stone fruit notes you love, with a dank, resinous finish. So if you love hops, trust us, you won't be disappointed! Fauve - Quatrieme Dimension

item.title: Ivoire Sombre
item.beer_description: This second part of our Imperial Stouts diptych celebrates coconut in all its facets, with a double dose of fresh, as well as toasted, coconut flakes. While delicious on its own, it was designed to blend with 'Black Orchid' (double vanilla) to create a cohesive and decadent experience. Fauve - Ivoire Sombre

item.title: Creuser La Vague (collab GROSS)
item.beer_description: The return match of our collaboration with Gross, the Spanish Basque Country brewery where we previously brewed in San Sebastián. This Double NEIPA DDH takes us on a tropical wave thanks to the trio of Citra, Strata, and Sabro. Fauve - Creuser La Vague

item.title: The Piggy - Piggy Brewing Quintet
