item.beer_description: The Piggy Brewing Company - Quintet contains: - West Coast PatrolIPA - American | 5,6% | 440 ml - Hop GeminiIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - Don JefeIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - Lacrima de Oro (2026)IPA - Triple New England / Hazy | 9,5% | 440 ml - MuvukaStout - Imperial / Double | 12% | 330 ml The Piggy Brewing Company - Piggy Brewing Quintet

item.title: Hopalaa - Hopalaa Triplet
item.beer_description: The Hopalaa - Triplet contains: - JUNGALAAIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - TURBULENCEIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 440 ml - DOUBLE PASSIONIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8,2% | 440 ml Hopalaa - Hopalaa Triplet

item.title: Factory Brewing - Factory Brewing Anniversary Quartet
item.beer_description: The Factory Brewing - Quartet contains: - Distant ClosenessIPA - New England / Hazy | 7,3% | 440 ml - Turbid DreamsIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8,0% | 440 ml - Perpetual MotionIPA - Triple New England / Hazy | 10,0% | 440 ml - Eye OpenerStout - Pastry | 12,0% | 440 ml Factory Brewing - Factory Brewing Anniversary Quartet

item.title: HubærleyWine
item.beer_description: Here’s Hubærleywine 🍻 A big, malty, and warming Barley Wine with a little citrus twist… but still perfectly balanced! Gaspard Brasserie Artisanale - HubrleyWine

item.title: PASSÉ / PRÉSENT / FUTUR
item.beer_description: Nectarine, Citrus, Nelson Sauvin T90 & Subzero Hop Kief EXP Artisan - PASSE / PRESENT / FUTUR

item.title: Brewer's Reserve Tiramisu Stout
item.beer_description: A true 'pick-me-up,' our Brewer's Reserve Tiramisu Stout captures all the decadence and flavor of the classic Italian dessert. We infused this beer with a custom espresso blend roasted by Emy J's in Stevens Point, WI crafted with this brew in mind. Its robust coffee backbone gives way to a balanced blend of of cocoa nibs and vanilla, offering subtle sweetness and an unforgettable experience for beer and dessert lovers alike. Central Waters - Brewer's Reserve Tiramisu Stout

item.title: ÉMERGENCE
item.beer_description: TIPA Citra, Nelson Sauvin, Eggers Special, Galaxy From the very first sip, it's an explosion of pineapple and mango right in your face 🥭🍍 Then comes a light vanilla almond in the background, followed by a beautiful, resinous, hoppy sap with a touch of spice 🌿✨. All supported by a massive, textured, enveloping body. It's a real aromatic assault. BreWskey - EMERGENCE

item.title: Yes But Not Today
item.beer_description: There are times in life when, no matter how much willpower you have (even on Monday morning), if the universe has decided it's a no… well, it's a no… So when we decided to unveil our Innovative, Revolutionary, and Disruptive Dry Hopping Technique© for this new NEIPA, it told us, "Yes, but no, not today," leaving us standing there in front of all our gear, precariously but undeniably cleverly hooked up. So we'll save it for later, which won't stop us from enjoying this hoppy brew powered by Idaho 7, hot Mosaic Dynaboost, Amarillo Cryo for the first dry hop, and Krush + Mosaic Cryo for the second. Mogwai - Yes But Not Today

item.title: Sauce Du Chef Series - Pinch of Tabasco
item.beer_description: Double NEIPA with Tabasco. Hot! This Double NEIPA is hot! Since we were going to do some Tabasco magic, we went all out, using recent and/or experimental hop varieties that aren't yet fully established: Erebus and Alora from Hopsteiner, and HBC638 from Yakima. No need to beat around the bush, the combination delivers a big salad of yellow fruits (peach, apricot) aromatically, while the Tabasco heats things up and adds a touch of smoky chili. IT'S A BIG FIGHT IN YOUR THROAT! Mogwai - Sauce Du Chef Series - Pinch of Tabasco
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Pretty Stable Chaos
item.beer_description: Brown IPA Sabro/Talus. Just like Red IPAs, the Brown IPA style isn't the easiest to sell, and therefore, it's not easy to get your hands on it. So, all the more reason for us to make one, by Jove! On a base of caramelized and chocolatey malts, we've enhanced the aromatic richness with Sabro and Talus hops, each contributing notes of coconut. As expected from a Mogwai IPA, the bitterness is quite pronounced and adds a resinous touch to the overall flavor. In short, yet another brew whose sole purpose is to complete our Pokédex of beer styles to brew! Mogwai - Pretty Stable Chaos

item.title: Cronos And the Infinite Hoppiness (collab Mogwaï& Les Danaïdes & Hôp[i])
item.beer_description: After the insane brew produced by our friends at L’Instant (a Triple NEIPA with 20 hops) and the 90-minute IPA we brewed with our buddies at Hôp[i], we definitely needed a 120-minute Imperial West Coast IPA to stand up to the comparison. Brewed in Dijon, without mustard, this is nothing less than a massive combination of Columbus, Centennial, Amarillo, Chinook, Simcoe, and Warrior hops that have been dabbled in this heavy West Coast IPA. The bitterness is incredibly smooth with a beautiful aromatic attack from the Simcoe and Centennial, then it develops into resin and hoppy notes, finishing with a bitter orange-resin aftertaste! It's warming without being boozy, and with just the right amount of malt structure to support the hoppy intensity. Independent - Cronos And the Infinite Hoppiness

item.title: Orange Blaster
item.beer_description: This hazy New England Double IPA unleashes a supernova of citrus flavor, with Citra and Cryo Citra erupting like solar flares and Krush adding a bright, tropical punch. Soft and pillowy with a nebula-like haze, Orange Blaster propels your taste buds through orbit with explosive notes of orange, tangerine, and ripe fruit on a smooth, cosmic-cloud finish. Tin Barn - Orange Blaster
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Nuclear Queen (collab District 96)
item.beer_description: The missile silos opened. The countdown began. The payloads crammed full of Citra hops deployed to shoot juicy Hellfire directly into this quadruple IPA. With the help of neighboring ally, @district96beer , the Queen rained forth an awesome explosive blast of ripe orangey pineapple fallout. Queen Citra has used the Nuclear Option. Tin Barn - Nuclear Queen

item.title: Snakes In the Park (collab North Park)
item.beer_description: Binary arid hopped with Nelson, Moteuka, and Wakatu, Notes of dank peach rings, ripe pineapple, stone fruits. Super thick and creamy with a well balanced SNAKEFRUIT finish District 96 - Snakes In the Park

item.title: Secret Heady Quarters
item.beer_description: Triple IPA, dry hopped with Nelson Sauvin, Rakau, Nelson Sauvin Hop Kief, and Rakau Hop Kief. In collaboration with Freestyle Hops and their Hop Research Collective. 10% ABV. DankHouse - Secret Heady Quarters

item.title: Lift Sesh
item.beer_description: Who doesn't like to be reminded of those rides up to the highest peaks, before blazing a path through some fresh powder? We loaded the tanks up with some Citra, Nelson Sauvin, and Enigma to make you think of those perfect days! DankHouse - Lift Sesh
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Half-Shell Heroes (Red Edition) - FULLY LOADED
item.beer_description: FULLY LOADED Hazy Double IPA with Citra, El Dorado, Rakau. Contains barley, wheat, oats. Sudden Death - Half-Shell Heroes (Red Edition) - FULLY LOADED
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Divine Jobless
item.beer_description: Double dry hopped Hazy IPA with Citra, Strata, Nectaron. Contains barley, wheat, oats. Sudden Death - Divine Jobless

item.title: Welcome Back, Freaks (2026)
item.beer_description: Hazy IPA with Citra, Enigma. Contains barley, wheat, oats. Sudden Death - Welcome Back, Freaks (2026)

item.title: Space Doom Vacuum (2026)
item.beer_description: 2026 version: Heavily fruited Smoothie Sour with blackcurrant, sweet cherry, sour cherry. Contains barley, wheat, oats, lactose. The Primeval One. Our 'Big Bang' sour. Space Doom Vacuum cemented our standing as one of the top fruit sour brewers in Europe. This fruit bomb was conditioned on a whopping 500 g. 4 L of blackcurrant, sweet cherry, and sour cherry purée and concentrate, and rounded out with vanilla and sea salt. Still fresh, luxurious, and flavourful as ever. Get it while you can! Sudden Death - Space Doom Vacuum (2026)

item.title: Luna Mortua
item.beer_description: Hazy IPA with Citra, Mosaic, Motueka. Contains barley, wheat, oats. Sudden Death - Luna Mortua
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Herbruikbare blikjes clip (4 blikjes)
item.beer_description: Free for orders over €75 (excluding shipping). Various colors available (see photo). Please indicate your preference in the comments section during checkout. Herbruikbare blikjes clip (4 blikjes)

item.title: Vuurboetmeester 205 – Brandy Barrel Aged Barleywine
item.beer_description: Our Vuurboeter Barleywine has been aged for 12 months in brandy barrels. The beer has aromas reminiscent of grapes and wine, with a subtle vanilla undertone from the oak. The sweetness of the malt balances beautifully with the fruity notes of the brandy. Bierbrouwerij De Magistraat - Vuurboetmeester 205 Brandy Barrel Aged Barleywine

item.title: Brisa Alta (collab Uchu)
item.beer_description: Collab met Uchu Brewing - Triple IPA met houblons Nelson Sauvin, Motueka, Rakau & Southern Cross Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Brisa Alta

item.title: Aquilon
item.beer_description: IPA Quadruple with Peacherine, Nectaron, Riwaka & Rakau hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Aquilon

item.title: Barrel-Aged American Imperial Stout
item.beer_description: Go back to old-school bottle share days with bomber bottles of this classic Barrel-Aged American Imperial Stout. Heavy and balanced, no adjuncts or wild flavorings, just good old-fashioned barrel-aged stout. Untitled Art - Barrel-Aged American Imperial Stout

item.title: Tides II
item.beer_description: Heavily hopped with: Citra, Mosaic, Idaho 7, Estate Grown Comet Lolev Beer - Tides II

item.title: Double Lupula (2026 Ultra Hopped)
item.beer_description: 2026 version of Double Lupula, ultra hopped with freestyle hops: Freestyle Riwaka, Motueka, Moutere Lolev Beer - Double Lupula (2026 Ultra Hopped)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Barrel Aged Written In the Stars (collab Mortalis)
item.beer_description: Bourbon barrel aged imperial stout conditioned on Jamaican Blue Mountain coffee, Ecuadorian cacao nibs, and 100+ pounds of toasted coconut. 13.5% ABV. Imprint - Barrel Aged Written In the Stars

item.title: Brewer’s Reserve 7 Layer Stout (2025)
item.beer_description: No Midwestern potluck would be complete without a tray or two of 7 Layer Bars. Also known as 'Magic Bars', these tasty treats are known for one thing: Packing a massive amount of flavor and sugar into a very small package. That's exactly what we did with this beer. Try to pace yourself. Central Waters - Brewers Reserve 7 Layer Stout (2025)

item.title: HYPA #5
item.beer_description: Hypa #5, the newest version in our HYPA series, is brewed with Mosaic and Simcoe hops on a base of Golden Promise English malt. The result is an aromatic symphony with notes of peach, apricot, pineapple, and fruit salad! Brasserie du Bas-Canada - HYPA #5

item.title: Crépuscule (collab Off Script)
item.beer_description: Collab with Off Script Brewing - Double IPA with Peacharine, Riwaka and Kohia Nelson hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Crepuscule

item.title: Double Happiness : Earth Rooster
item.beer_description: The "Double Happiness" series is Maktoob's flagship brand of thick, heavy New England IPAs. For this 6th edition, Earth Rooster, they've chosen the "king of hops": Citra and Nelson Sauvin. Hazy, creamy, and intensely fruity. The Nelson Sauvin (from New Zealand) delivers unique, wine-like notes of white grapes (Sauvignon Blanc) and gooseberry. The Citra complements this perfectly with a burst of lime, grapefruit, and tropical fruit. Maktoob - Double Happiness : Earth Rooster
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Abduction In the Desert
item.beer_description: This 8% ABV Double IPA is double dry-hopped (DDH) and focuses on the exclusive Peacharine hop from New Zealand, supported by the ever-reliable Citra. Get ready for a stonefruit explosion. The Peacharine hop does exactly what the name promises: it delivers intense notes of juicy peach and nectarine. The Citra adds a refreshing layer of lime and grapefruit. The beer is hazy, full-bodied, and smooth in texture, making it dangerously easy to drink despite its 8% ABV. A "fruit juice" for adults. Maktoob - Abduction In the Desert

item.title: Yeastmode
item.beer_description: Fresh harvest Mosaic 2025 Double IPA with Yeast Side Labs. 18°Blg Ziemia Obiecana - Yeastmode
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: When In Prague
item.beer_description: Tropical IPA Southern Cross, El Dorado, Nelson Sauvin Maui Pineapple Ziemia Obiecana - When In Prague

item.title: Smuteczki
item.beer_description: Double Sour Guava, Passion Fruit, Coconut 20 pcs Ziemia Obiecana - Smuteczki

item.title: Destructio 0005
item.beer_description: IPA Double New England with Peacharine Hop Kief, Peacharine, Citra & Nelson Sauvin hops Messorem - Destructio #0005
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: EL LUPULO
item.beer_description: IPA New England with Citra, Cashmere & Anchovy hops BreWskey - EL LUPULO

item.title: AMPLINOVA
item.beer_description: IPA Quadruple with Citra T90 + Dynaboost, Nelson Sauvin T90 + Amplifire & Motueka T90 + Amplifire hops BreWskey - AMPLINOVA

item.title: Destructio 0004
item.beer_description: Double IPA - Citra, NZ Cascade, NZ Cascade Hop Kief Messorem - Destructio 0004
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Waypoint (2026) (collab Badlands)
item.beer_description: Waypoint DIPA, brewed in collaboration with Badlands Brewing, was treated with a massive dry-hop featuring two of their favourite hops from 2025: New Zealand Cascade and Nectaron, both from Freestyle Hops. Bright and expressive, this beer has notes of juicy berry and tropical citrus, with a touch of dank pine on the finish. Fine Balance - Waypoint (2026)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Expedition (2026) (collab Counterpart)
item.beer_description: Brewed with our friends at Counterpart Brewing in Niagara Falls, ON, Expedition Quad IPA is a big beer with bold flavour. Dry-hopped exclusively with Freestyle Hops—Rakau, Motueka, Nelson Sauvin, and Riwaka—it has notes of tropical fruit salad, guava, papaya, and lime zest. Bright and fresh, this beer finishes with a punch. Fine Balance - Expedition (2026)

item.title: Quest (collab All My Friends)
item.beer_description: The first stop on our IPA Tour Vol. 2 brings us to Bloomfield, PEC, home of All My Friends Beer Co. Quest IPA is a bright and sunny hazy IPA, with notes of pithy grapefruit, passionfruit, and white wine grape. At 6.5% ABV, it’s easy-drinking yet packed with flavour. Fine Balance - Quest

item.title: Thistle Dew
item.beer_description: West coast IPA. Cascade, Centennial ans Simcoe hops. Wood Brothers - Thistle Dew

item.title: IUPAC (collab GROSS)
item.beer_description: With this NEIPA we wanted to go beyond the dank side of our favorite hops so we called our friends from Gross in Spain and together we made a super terpene charged NEIPA full of weedy flavours. NO THC ;) Prizm - IUPAC

item.title: Peadair
item.beer_description: A birthday brew from Gliwice’s Beer Brothers - a peat-smoked, intense, and uncompromising Imperial Stout aged in Wild Turkey bourbon barrels. 36blg Funky Fluid - Peadair

item.title: Please The Crowds (collab SOMA Beer)
item.beer_description: FEATURING – Please the crowds DDH Double NEIPA – 8 % Houblons : Citra / Galaxy / Mosaic / Sabro Collab : SOMA (??) Prizm - Please The Crowds
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Sunken Ship (collab Stu Mostów)
item.beer_description: FEATURING – Sunken Ship DDH Triple NEIPA – 9% Houblons : Citra / Strata / Nectaron Collab : Browar Stu Mostów (??) Prizm - Sunken Ship

item.title: More Pressure (collab Les Intenables - Craft Beer)
item.beer_description: Our first ever Smoothie Sour with our dear friends from Les Intenables in Alsace. Unfermented fruit purees to keep all the juicyness and flavours. Lactose free - Vegan Prizm - More Pressure

item.title: Field Trip (collab Willibald Farm Distillery &)
item.beer_description: We brewed this beer with our friends at Willibald Farm Distillery & Brewery & Distillery in Ary, Ontario. Willibald inspires us by the breadth and quality of what they produce (including a regular offering of top-notch TIPAs). Field Trip Triple IPA is a big beer at 10% ABV, yet it drinks incredibly smooth. Dry-hopped with Superdelic, Citra, and Nelson Sauvin hops, we get delicious tropical fruit, citrus, and candy flavours. Fine Balance - Field Trip

item.title: Levain (Blend #5)
item.beer_description: Levain is a long time coming. The culmination of our thoughts, feelings, and beliefs about the micro-organisms that allow us to make beer. Mashed with raw spelt from Janie’s Mill, hopped with aged whole cone hops then fermented and ripened in used oak wine barrels with a blend of our house saison yeast, our favorite strains of brettanomyces, dregs from bottles that inspire us, and microorganisms sourced from my 6 year old sourdough starter. Levain is deeply complex yet spryly drinkable with a delightful acidity. You’ll find notes of limeade, lemon zest, lychee, mango, musky leather, earthy blue cheese, wet hay, pink starburst, papaya, black cherry, and a touch of oaky vanillin and spice. is/was brewing - Levain (Blend #5)

item.title: Monolith
item.beer_description: Born from the Sigil series, Monolith is a recurring barleywine from our barrel Magister, JC Klecko. Batch one was aged exclusively in a mix of bourbon barrels for an average of 15 months. BOW to the MONOLITH Bissell Brothers - Monolith

item.title: Serum: Blueberry / Pomegranate
item.beer_description: Brewlihan's "Serum: Blueberry Pomegranate" is a popular flavor in their line of session meads, offering a sweet-tart blend of blueberries and pomegranate Brewlihan - Serum: Blueberry / Pomegranate

item.title: Angels With Filthy Souls 2025
item.beer_description: Our almighty deity, brooding as ever, returns just in time for the holidays! AWFS is our imperial porter, double-mashed with an array of Maine and English specialty malts, boiled with over a barrel of Grade A Robust maple syrup, and faithfully aged in freshly emptied bourbon casks that are all-too-familar with sin. Immense, complex, and decadent. Keep the change, ya filthy animal. Bissell Brothers - Angels With Filthy Souls 2025

item.title: Rocky Road (2026)
item.beer_description: White Dog Brewery's Rocky Road is a tribute to the classic treat packed with chocolate, marshmallows, and nuts. With a robust 11% ABV, this is a true "liquid treat." It's a beer for those moments when you really want to indulge: rich, luxurious, and with a delightfully unique twist. This beer is a party in your glass. As soon as you pour it, the aromas of milk chocolate and soft vanilla greet you. The addition of lactose gives the beer a silky, almost syrupy texture. You'll taste a full base of roasted malts, complemented by the sweetness of marshmallows and a hint of almond and nutty notes. White Dog - Rocky Road (2026)

item.title: Cookie & Cream
item.beer_description: Brace yourself for a liquid dessert in a glass. This Imperial Pastry Stout from White Dog Brewery is a tribute to the ultimate guilty pleasure: cookies and cream. With a hefty 11% ABV, this isn't a beer to drink easily, but a true sipper for lovers of full, sweet flavors. A beer that's essentially a hug in a glass, but one with a serious kick! As soon as you pour the beer, you'll smell the unmistakable aroma of freshly baked chocolate chip cookies, vanilla extract, and a hint of roasted malt. An explosion of flavor. It's thick, syrupy, and silky smooth thanks to the added lactose. You'll taste dark chocolate, creamy vanilla, and a hint of coffee that balances the sweetness. White Dog - Cookie & Cream

item.title: Big Bourbon Barrel Aged Stout 2021
item.beer_description: 2021’s iteration of our annual barrel aged stout release. For the bourbon lovers, for the imperial stout lovers and for the lovers of two great alcoholic beverages colliding to make one beautiful beer. Not on the other hand, for the calorie conscious. Imperial Stout aged on Bourbon barrels. Matured for a year on Jim Beam, Woodford Reserve and King’s Country distillery barrels, for an imperial stout emboldened with the deep, rich flavours of a bourbon. Intensely sweet, with a low roasted bitterness, rich aromas of oak, vanilla, brown sugar, molasses and more. Stigbergets - Big Bourbon Barrel Aged Stout 2021

item.title: BIGGER! BOLDER!
item.beer_description: Bigger! Bolder! is a really beefed up version of New & Improved. IPA has become DIPA here, a stronger and more flavorful beer. It is Nelson Sauvin, Mosaic and Citra that give the lightly cloudy beer its tropical fruitiness. Stigbergets - BIGGER! BOLDER!
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: DOUBLE PASSION
item.beer_description: DOUBLE PASSION - QDH DIPA. Nelson Sauvin and Citra hops /// IBU - 25 /// EBC - 9 /// ABV - 8.2 Hopalaa - DOUBLE PASSION
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: TURBULENCE
item.beer_description: TURBULENCE - HAZY DIPA. Elani and Citra Lupomax hops. /// IBU - 30 /// EBC - 11 /// ABV - 8.0 Hopalaa - TURBULENCE
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: JUNGALAA
item.beer_description: THE JUNGLE - THE CITY. Riwaka, Mosaic, Motueka hops /// IBU - 28 /// EBC - 10 /// ABV - 8.0 Hopalaa - JUNGALAA
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Don Jefe
item.beer_description: Hops : Mosaic The Piggy - Don Jefe
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Muvuka
item.beer_description: Barrel Aged Imperial Stout. Cacao, Tonka beans The Piggy - Muvuka

item.title: West Coast Patrol
item.beer_description: Modern West Coast IPA Hops : Centennial, Krush, Mosaic The Piggy - West Coast Patrol

item.title: Hop Gemini
item.beer_description: Hops : Citra, Idaho7 The Piggy - Hop Gemini
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Lacrima de Oro (2026)
item.beer_description: The Magic Beer 'Golden Tears' is a 10% ABV Triple NEIPA. Hops: Mosaic, Sabro. Last batch at 9.5% The Piggy - Lacrima de Oro (2026)

item.title: Neon Pulse (collab Neon Raptor)
item.beer_description: New England DIPA with a classic grain bill featuring oats that emphasizes haze, malty fullness and a bright, pale color. Nelson Sauvin hops in the whirlpool and dry hop provide a stable, beautiful haze and plenty of white fruit character. Citra adds the signature citrusy hop notes, while Dolcita, a new variety previously known under the trade number 1019, brings bold and expressive character to the mix. A perfect beer for fans of double dry hopping and juicy hop intensity. Stu Mostow - Neon Pulse
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Latitude Zero
item.beer_description: NEIPA with Citra & Nelson Sauvin Unseen - Latitude Zero

item.title: XI Anniversary | Block Party (collab White Dog)
item.beer_description: Celebrating Stu Mostów’s 11th anniversary, this is No. 2 of 3 beers in the birthday can series. Banana Mango Lemon Ice Cream Pastry Sour brewed with White Dog Brewery. An ice-cream dessert in beer form? Absolutely. This fruity sour blends juicy mango with creamy banana, lifted by natural lemon juice that adds acidity and bright citrus character. The whole profile is enriched with delicious Italian ice-cream notes. Yes! Ice cream in the middle of winter. The result is a smooth, intensely fruity, dessert-like beer. Stu Mostow - XI Anniversary | Block Party

item.title: Inky (December 2025)
item.beer_description: Inky is our annual blend of imperial stout aged in some of our finest barrels. Our only rule for this beer is that it has to be composed of imperial stout and aged in barrels that are 1, 2 and 3 years old (ish). Inky (December 2025) is composed of: one part 1792 bourbon barrel aged for 34 months; one part Willett Bourbon Barrel aged for 30 months and one part Heaven Hill bourbon barrel aged for 22 months with just a splash of Moon Port for extra complexity. Inky is always special to us. We dig out characterful barrels to anchor the blend and provide it with a structure that only patience, time and careful stewarding can provide. This year's blend is a delectable melange presenting notes of chocolate, oak, caramel, spirit and toffee. Inky (December 2025) is the culmination of many years of planning, brewing, and aging. It is the product of much patience, struggle and a focused eye to the future. A beer that rewards patience, flexibility and a wanton disregard for ROI. We’re thrilled to be able to share this blend with you now. Badlands - Inky (December 2025)

item.title: You Can't Control
item.beer_description: Galaxy, Mosaic, Mosaic Lupomax Polly's - You Can't Control

item.title: 8th Birthday - India Pale Ale (collab Beak)
item.beer_description: POLLY'S 8th BIRTHDAY We’ve been huge fans of the wonderful Beak pretty much since they first landed on our radars - operating a similar philosophy to ourselves in largely focusing on and perfecting their pale and hoppy output, we’ve been very lucky to share festival spaces with our friends from Lewes over the last twelve months, fostering a working friendship based on mutual approaches to where modern beer is placed in 2026. Coming together to collaborate for our eighth birthday meant there could only be one style we could brew - an IPA at that magical ABV in which the sweet spot lies for both breweries. Wanting to make a conscious effort to embrace the progression of our industry with the recipe on this beer, we’ve brought no less than five hop varieties to the party; showcasing current and progressive technologies in the brewing process. With a dry hop charge of 20g/l, pushing toward DIPA levels of intensity, we’ve utilised Idaho 7 and Nelson Sauvin in their classic T90 pellet form, along with their CGX versions - the latest technology from Crosby Hops using cryogenic processes to concentrate the flavour and intensity brought to the table. With a final flourish of New Zealand Hop’s latest experimental variety NZ-106 and a whisper of Abstrax Hops Skyfarm Pineapple, the result is a pillowy soft IPA, singing with guava, mango, and passionfruit, with bright pine and citrus notes underneath. Taking the artwork on this one is local enigma Jim Jones, who leaned into the German heritage of the bauhaus Polly's - 8th Birthday - India Pale Ale

item.title: 8th Birthday - Double India Pale Ale (collab Cloudwater)
item.beer_description: POLLY'S 8th BIRTHDAY Our friendship with the legendary Cloudwater extends for as long as Polly’s has existed at this point. As a source of sage advice and guidance throughout our brewing journey, we’re proud to have been able to share experiences with the titans of Manchester in both working and personal capacities over our eight years in the game. When it came to filling the collaboration slot for a big, bold double IPA we could only look to the innovators of modern beer in the UK to join us for our eighth birthday, not only on the brewing side of things but the artwork to boot, with Cloudwater’s go-to designer, the Manchester based Textbook Studio handling the label design. Wanting to embrace the progressive nature of the industry we operate within, and showcase the skills our respective brew teams are capable of, we’ve turned the hype dial up to eleven on this DIPA. We’d already been enchanted by our first use of Eggers Special hops, so when the prospect of working with another New Zealand blend in Mega Motueka came about in our initial discussions we leapt at the opportunity. Utilising further dry hop charges of Lupomax Citra and Nectaron Cryo, this DIPA solely focuses on hype and hype alone. Our finished product is a DIPA that positively rinses every last drop of lively lemon, muddled lime with brown sugar, tropical fruits, passionfruit, soft peach flavours, and pineapple backed up with a light dankness. Polly's - 8th Birthday - Double India Pale Ale

item.title: 8th Birthday - Danish Pastry Imperial Stout (collab Azvex)
item.beer_description: POLLY'S 8th BIRTHDAY It’s always a given that when it comes to Birthday Beer time, we’re always going to dip over to the dark side. Who better then to extend an invitation to share knowledge and expertise with than one of the best in the game today when it comes to imperial stouts, and one which we’ve worked closely with since their launch, Azvex? As longtime admirers of their big, decadent pastry stouts, we couldn’t think of anyone better to work with than our friends from just over the water in Liverpool. Working our recipe around the fika breaks we have at Polly’s every working day, we loved the idea of creating the flavour profile of a danish pastry in this beer - utilising the fresh vanilla we’ve applied to our Oat Cream beers, alongside raisin for a subtle fruit sweetness, and a final flourish of cinnamon to balance everything out. Featuring artwork produced by the wonderful local artist and good friend of the brewery Jake Cross, this beer took up a grand total of five separate brew slots in our brewing week, with a ridiculous twenty-four hour slow rolling boil to concentrate all those sugars. the result is a slick, oily and decadent imperial stout - rich in flavour but not cloying, and widely regarded within the brewery as our best imperial stout brewed over our eight year history. Polly's - 8th Birthday - Danish Pastry Imperial Stout

item.title: Hydra | Raspberry + Strawberry + Pink Guava
item.beer_description: This Fruited Smoothie Sour blends raspberries, strawberry and pink guava together to form just one of this monster’s many heads. Keep your eyes peeled for even more flavor combinations. Mortalis - Hydra | Raspberry + Strawberry + Pink Guava

item.title: La Torre
item.beer_description: We infused it with dozens of kilos of hazelnuts, coconut, and Madagascar vanilla. We then added a final touch by incorporating organic Cielito Lindo coffee from the Santa Barbara region of Honduras, custom-roasted by our friends at Bridgehead. This liquid dessert transports us back to childhood with notes of Nutella, vanilla frosting, and roasted nuts. Brasserie du Bas-Canada - La Torre

item.title: whiteferrari
item.beer_description: whiteferrari is a beer that has been a long time in the making. We've been experimenting with different malt and hop combinations through other recipes, trying to find what we believe is the best of both worlds rolled into one DIPA. Clocking in at 8%, this luxuriously soft DIPA is hopped intensely with 50/50 Citra and Galaxy(and a ton of it!). We used the freshest crop available of each hop to give this DIPA the most expressive hop character possible. The Veil - whiteferrari
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Mors Communis (collab Mortalis)
item.beer_description: This lethally hoppy DIPA was brewed with our friends from Avon, NY. A name with a reputation for making exceptionally high-caliber beers, and with whom we have the pleasure of solidifying a friendship over the course of festivals around the world. Messorem - Mors Communis
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Euphoria
item.beer_description: Last release of 2025 : Double New England IPA brewed with Riwaka, Motueka and Cryo Citra. Full of freshness, crushed citrus, passion fruits, lime and pink grapefruit. Norm - Euphoria
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Eclipse
item.beer_description: DDH IPA Hops : Eclipse / Nelson Sauvin IPA at 7%, slightly stronger than usual (winter is coming) and brewed with a combo we deeply love ! 2 hops and 2 countries, Eclipse from Australia and Nelson Sauvin from New Zealand. It’s actually pretty long since we used a hop from Australia ! Eclipse offers sweet mandarin flavors and zesty citrus peel and fresh pine needles. We pair it with our house favorite, Nelson Sauvin. Bringing his famous and distinct gooseberry and Sauvignon Blanc grapes. Juicy, fresh and balanced ! Norm - Eclipse

item.title: Nelson Focus
item.beer_description: Focus Series #1 : Nelson T90 2025 x Nelson Sauvin CRYO x Nelson Sauvin Hop Kief sub zero (Freestyle hops) Here is the first beer of our focus series. A series of beers focus on one hop ! Nelson Sauvin : Probably the perfect hop to start with ! The star of New Zealand, a true classic that never disappoint, the one you can always rely on, the hop we could use in every beer ! Nelson Sauvin is shining here with its crushed gooseberries, white wine, grapes, citrus and pink grapefruit vibes. Norm - Nelson Focus
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Superdelic Signal (collab Basqueland)
item.beer_description: Collab with Basqueland Hops: Superdelic Tasting Notes: Citrus Fruit • Bay Fruit • Tropical Outer Range - Superdelic Signal

item.title: Above the Noise (collab Fidens)
item.beer_description: Collaboration with Fidens Brewing Co. (NY, Albany) Hops: Citra, Motueka, Riwaka, Nelson Tasting Notes: Mango, Grapefruit, White Grape ABV: 9% Outer Range - Above the Noise
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Liquid Krush (collab Moersleutel)
item.beer_description: Collab Moersleutel Hops : Krush & Galaxy Outer Range - Liquid Krush

item.title: Pillow Stacks
item.beer_description: DIPA. Hops: Mosaic. Tasting Notes: Dark Berries, Cannabis, Pine. ABV: 7.6% Outer Range - Pillow Stacks
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Fine Balance Brewing Triplet
item.beer_description: The Fine Balance Brewing Pack contains: - Nelson & CreamIPA - New England / Hazy | 6,5% | 473 ml - Double Nelson & CreamIPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy | 8% | 473 ml - Triple Nelson & CreamIPA - Triple New England / Hazy | 10% | 473 ml Fine Balance Brewing Triplet

item.title: BA Treats Of Strength
item.beer_description: Barrel aged in Makers Mark Bourbon Barrels for 34 months (2025). Chocolate Nutella Babka-inspired Pastry Stout brewed with Two Row Barley, Pale Chocolate Malt, Oated, and Wheated. Conditioned on Cacao Nibs and Hazelnuts. Icarus - BA Treats Of Strength

item.title: Lady Cupcake #10 (Cocoa Nibs, Vanilla & Caramel)
item.beer_description: An Imperial Pastry Stout with Cocoa Nibs, Vanilla Beans & Caramel. 'Our tenth Lady Cupcake is treated with Ecuadorian cocoa nibs, vanilla beans from Madagascar, Papua New Guinea, and Uganda, as well as caramel.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory - Lady Cupcake #10 (Cocoa Nibs, Vanilla & Caramel)

item.title: Shamrock Stout (2026)
item.beer_description: Bourbon Barrel-Aged Stout with Peppermint and Cocoa Nibs. A hint of mint, a touch of cocoa, a lot of luck For the lucky few, Shamrock Stout has been a beer for those fortunate enough to find it on draft at the Goose Island Fulton Street Taproom every March. Now, for the first time, we’re excited to release this annual favorite in bottles. Everyone can enjoy a taste of our annual tradition at home. Since green beer has never really been our thing, the release of this imperial stout is how we like to say: “sláinte.” Goose Island Shamrock Stout is a decadent delight that is aged for a full year in freshly emptied bourbon barrels and finished with peppermint, cocoa nibs and vanilla. The aging process imparts rich, warming notes of oak and whiskey, while the addition of cocoa nibs and vanilla adds layers of sweetness and complexity. Goose Island Shamrock Stout is a perfect way to raise a toast this year without having to dye the river green. Goose Island - Shamrock Stout (2026)

item.title: Eye Opener (collab Two Flints)
item.beer_description: An Imperial Coffee Stout brewed with Two Flints Brewery and treated with coffee beans from Samples Coffee and Good Life Coffee. "We have used a lot of coffee in our Stouts and we have loved how different coffee beans can be. This Imperial Coffee Stout is brewed with coffee beans from Good Life Coffee and Samples Coffee." Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Eye Opener Factory - Eye Opener

item.title: Perpetual Motion (collab Ārpus)
item.beer_description: A Hazy TIPA With Motueka & Nelson Sauvin hops. Brewed in collaboration with Arpus Brewery. "With our Latvian friends Ārpus we wanted to go big! We dry hopped this Triple Hazy IPA with Motueka and Nelson Sauvin. Expect loads of tropical fruits, lime, grapefruit, white wine and white pepper." Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory Brewing - Perpetual Motion Factory - Perpetual Motion

item.title: Distant Closeness (collab Beak)
item.beer_description: A Hazy IPA with Citra, NZ Cascade, and Southern Cross. "With BEAK from the UK we selected a beautiful hop combination of Citra, NZ Cascade, and Southern Cross to showcase the strong citrus aromas of each hop. Alongside the citrus, you can expect notes of dankness, mango, and other stone fruits, rounded out by a pleasant grassiness." Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory - Distant Closeness

item.title: Turbid Dreams (collab Track)
item.beer_description: A Hazy DIPA with Nectaron & Nelson Sauvin, Motueka & Citra. "We are super excited to do this experiment with Track Brewing! We wanted to see how the same hops act in a Hazy IPA and a West Coast IPA. So Turbid Dreams is a Hazy DIPA with Nectaron & Nelson Sauvin, Motueka & Citra. It is hopped with the same varieties as its brother, Lucid Dreams. Be sure to try both beers!" Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory - Turbid Dreams
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: George Le Crapaud (collab BreWskey)
item.beer_description: George Le Crapaud (George the Toad) is an Imperial stout bottled on sweet cherry, organic toasted coconut from Sri Lanka, cocoa nibs from Ghana, vanilla from Uganda, and vegan marshmallow. A multi-flavored beer reminiscent of both Black Forest cake and coconut treats. Nano Cinco - George Le Crapaud

item.title: Side Eye
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Mosaic, Lorien, Enigma, Anchovy and HS 13459 Finback - Side Eye
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: All I Want For Christmas 2025 By Rackhouse
item.beer_description: This year’s edition is a bold blend of stout batches aged up to 36 months in maple syrup and bourbon barrels. Creamy and richly spiced, it carries a smooth bourbon warmth, while vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg add the perfect festive touch. A decadent holiday treat, perfect for cozy nights by the fire, enjoyed on its own or paired with Christmas cookies. LERVIG - All I Want For Christmas 2025 By Rackhouse

item.title: Didier Le Chihuaha (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: Didier le Chihuaha (Didier the Chihuahua) is a New England Triple IPA brewed with Motueka (T90 and SubZero Hop Kief), Southern Cross, and Citra hops—undoubtedly one of Messorem's favorites. This beer is rich in texture and bursting with flavor, driven by intense aromas of tropical fruit and citrus that explode on the palate. Nano Cinco - Didier Le Chihuaha

item.title: Robert Le Chat (collab Bad Bones)
item.beer_description: Robert Le Chat (Robert the Cat) is a New England Double IPA brewed with Southern Cross and Riwaka hops (T90 and SubZero Hop Kief) from Freestyle Hops in New Zealand. An ultra-silky and ultra-aromatic beer with pronounced notes of lemon zest, lime, and kumquat. An extra hoppy ale...? Nano Cinco - Robert Le Chat

item.title: Origin of Darkness Imperial Stout with Maple Syrup, Pistachio, Vanilla (collab Southern Grist)
item.beer_description: Taking advantage of our shared interest in decadent mascarpone desserts, we created this rich and luscious pastry stout. We included an irresistible flavour combination of rich maple syrup and nutty pistachios and topped it off with the creamy sweetness of both vanilla and lactose. Collective Arts - Origin of Darkness Imperial Stout with Maple Syrup, Pistachio, Vanilla

item.title: Citadelle
item.beer_description: DIPA with houblons Nectaron, Galaxy, Mosaic and Simcoe Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Citadelle

item.title: BBA Twice As Lonely (2025)
item.beer_description: Our 2025 Vintage is a blend of 19-31 month old bourbon barrel aged imperial stout conditioned on over 30 pounds per barrel of coconut and over 8 pounds per barrel of cacao nibs. Resident Culture - BBA Twice As Lonely (2025)

item.title: Gasping Dust
item.beer_description: A bed of white wheat and oats lay a lush foundation for two of our favorite hops to coalesce and intensify. Motueka and Nelson deliver waves of lime zest, tropical fruit mélange, and ambrosial orange sorbet. Autodidact Beer - Gasping Dust
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Encore
item.beer_description: Encore Maple Barrel Aged Imperial Stout comes roughly one year after the release of Fête, our fourth anniversary barrel aged sweet stout (which was aged in bourbon barrels previously filled with maple syrup). For about 16 months we've had this big, smooth imperial stout ageing in rye whiskey barrels that were previously housed maple syrup. We're delighted with how this beer turned out. It has a creamy mouthfeel, with a hint of sweetness cut by a touch of whiskey. Encore is big at 11.9% ABV, but smooth and easy drinking. It's a great winter treat. Fine Balance - Encore

item.title: Atavistic Beast
item.beer_description: Single Malt Barley wine, boiled for over 10 hours. Toffee, caramel, fruit cake, stewed fruits dominate in the flavour Sofia Electric - Atavistic Beast

item.title: Gray Monday (2025)
item.beer_description: Double Barrel-Aged Imperial Stout with Vanilla Beans and Hazelnuts Escape the ordinary with Gray Monday. This double barrel-aged imperial stout is a portal to a world of pure indulgence. Bourbon barrels and rye barrels weave a tapestry of flavors, accented by aromas of hazelnut and vanilla. The result? A symphony of sensations that will leave you craving more. The Bruery - Gray Monday (2025)

item.title: Kiwi (2026)
item.beer_description: New Zealand produces some of the finest hops in the world. Their growing region has a character unlike any other in the hop world and we are exceptionally smitten by it. Some of our favorite varieties to blend with come from the region, which is why we wanted to brew a beer that was aggressively hopped with some of our favy mcfavorites, and the results are sublime. Dry hopped with the holy New Zealand trifecta of Nelson Sauvin, Riwaka, and Motueka all hand selected from our friends at Freestyle hops. We taste heaven… but also gooseberry, lime, tropical fruit and dank berries. Perennially one of our favorite beers of the year. Badlands - Kiwi (2026)

item.title: Black Tuesday Blender's Choice (2025)
item.beer_description: Blended Barrel-Aged Imperial Stout Blended from our finest barrels, this is Black Tuesday Blender's Choice (2025). We hand-selected Peerless Rye barrels, Four Gate Bourbon barrels, Ruby Port barrels, and Zinfandel barrels for an exquisite Imperial Stout. Revel in notes of rich vanilla, deep oak, dark fruit leather, and robust chocolate. Perfect with a Kansas City Strip Steak. The Bruery - Black Tuesday Blender's Choice (2025)

item.title: Capitaine AMF - Le Ketch X All My Friends (collab All My Friends)
item.beer_description: We didn't have to do much persuading to convince our new friends in Prince Edward County to brew this double NEIPA with us. We hopped this beer in equal parts with Citra and Eggers Special, an extra-strong Riwaka. And of course, a generous amount of local honey. Le Ketch - Capitaine AMF - Le Ketch X All My Friends
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Life After Death Star (Batch 7) 2025 (collab J. Wakefield)
item.beer_description: With shredded raw coconut, marshmallow, Madagascar vanilla, and Mostra Ghost Bear Espresso Blend coffee along with a touch of lactose. Balanced notes of deep espresso coffee paired with flavors of fudge, creamy marshmallow, vanilla caviar, double fudge chocolate brownie batter, and cream of coconut. Equilibrium - Life After Death Star (Batch 7) 2025

item.title: Temporalis 0047
item.beer_description: Triple IPA - Citra, Mosaic, Simcoe, Simcoe Dynaboost, Simcoe Hyperboost Messorem - Temporalis #0047

item.title: Prodigality (2025)
item.beer_description: Churning out complexity through time & heat. The solo grain, Maris Otter, brims the mash tun for a long soak. Part of the first runnings were boiled & reduced, triggering the Maillard Reaction; through which, the vigorous heating of sugars adds a deeper color & flavor. Continuing on with an extended boil to increase said reaction. A prolonged nap of 20 months in bourbon barrels finishes off this luxurious prize. Indulge in Prodigality’s warm embrace. This batch of Prodigality gracefully rested for 20 months in well aged 19 year Elijah Craig barrels. By windfall, this blend offers robust honey tones that we typically don’t see in Prodigality, and is steadied by the well-aged character the barrels impart. Jackie Os - Prodigality (2025)

item.title: Don't Fear the Reaper (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: Hazy Triple IPA w/ Nelson Sauvin, Motueka & Motueka Hop Kief brewed in collaboration w/ Messorem Big, juice laden flavours of sauv blanc, gooseberry, apricot, lime zest and pineapple with a balanced, candy-like sweetness. Counterpart - Don't Fear the Reaper

item.title: Temporalis 0046
item.beer_description: Triple IPA - NZ Cascade, Citra, Simcoe & Simcoe Dynaboost. Messorem - Temporalis #0046

item.title: IMPERIAL P-NUT BUSTER - AMANDE
item.beer_description: Chocolate, peanut, coconut, vanilla... and almond stout BreWskey - IMPERIAL P-NUT BUSTER - AMANDE

item.title: YQB-N5
item.beer_description: YQB-N5 is a New England Quadruple IPA brewed with Riwaka, Rakau, and Motueka hops (used in three forms: T90, Hop Kief, and Amplifire). Its name and design are a nod to the Beluga, the colossal aircraft designed to transport other aircraft. It boasts intense aromas of Sauvignon Blanc and citrus, carried by a silky, enveloping texture. A beer whose sweetness skillfully masks its alcoholic strength. Nano Cinco - YQB-N5

item.title: Swirlee - Raspberry Creamsicle
item.beer_description: Swirlee is a creamsicle sour series that is far beyond your wildest, swirliest dreams, but don’t you worry, we went out and scooped it all up for you. This one is a tasty pairing of a whole buncha raspberry and vanilla ice cream, and if you drink too many, your noggin might turn into an ice cream cone so enjoy responsibly! Drekker - Swirlee - Raspberry Creamsicle

item.title: Towers
item.beer_description: Towers pours a hazy golden yellow with a light cap of fluffy foam. The nose hits with sticky tropical fruit and fresh strawberries. Strata, a hop variety we have rarely used in the past is quickly becoming one of our favourites. We get delicious flavours of cotton candy, fresh berries, pithy oranges, and mild pine. The sip is zippy and refreshing, with a clean bitterness that keeps everything balanced and easy to drink. All My Friends - Towers

item.title: Surprise
item.beer_description: Surprise pours a light straw yellow with tight, lingering bubbles. Dank, overripe fruit hits the nose as soon as you crack the can, with hints of white wine and pineapple. Nectaron has been impressing us this year, and in this beer it doesn’t disappoint. Combined with Nelson Sauvin from Freestyle hop farms and a Mosaic that brings that classic berry note, we get huge flavours of peach, blueberry, passionfruit, and guava. All of it coasting on a wonderfully soft and creamy mouthfeel that finishes super clean. Another banger in our books. All My Friends - Surprise
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Reversed 6(66)
item.beer_description: 9th Anniversary Bourbon Barrel Aged Imperial Stout with Salted Caramel. Bereta - Reversed 6(66)

item.title: Profan
item.beer_description: A blend of stouts aged in an Oloroso and an Aquavit barrel, finished with tobacco leaves. Blackout - Profan

item.title: Port & Bourbon BA - Sunset Damage
item.beer_description: Chocolate | Vanilla | Orange A blend of stouts aged in a ruby Port wine barrel and in a MGP bourbon barrel. Blackout - Port & Bourbon BA - Sunset Damage

item.title: Coffee Series - Indonesia
item.beer_description: Brewed with beans roasted in Cluj-Napoca, by Yume. Karana is a community of 377 smallholder farmers in the Kintamani region of Bali, cultivating coffee at an altitude of 1,200 meters on 477 hectares. In addition to coffee, the farmers grow oranges, vegetables, and other crops, contributing to biodiversity and sustainability. Through eco-friendly practices and a newly funded processing mill, Karana aims to become a trusted supplier of green coffee beans in both domestic and international markets. Blackout - Coffee Series - Indonesia

item.title: THE GAZE
item.beer_description: Barley Wine Aged 6 months in Wyoming Whiskey barrels. Menno Olivier - THE GAZE

item.title: Ego Death - Heaven Hill BA
item.beer_description: Marshmallow | Vanilla | Chocolate Aged in Heaven Hill bourbon barrels. Blackout - Ego Death - Heaven Hill BA

item.title: Bestowed - Oreo Brownie (collab Adroit Theory)
item.beer_description: Oreo Brownie Bestowed is an 11.5% Imperial Pastry Stout conditioned on chocolate, Oreos and brownies. We brewed it in collaboration with our friends from @AdroitTheory in Virginia. It's indulgent yet drinkable with notes of brownie batter and creamy chocolate. Third Moon - Bestowed - Oreo Brownie

item.title: Tranquillité Rhum Jamaique
item.beer_description: Tranquillity also comes in a Jamaican version, where this Barleywine has been aged in Jamaican rum casks??! This time, it is the aromas of brown sugar, sherry and caramel that unfold in harmony to finish with a well-rounded and woody finish. Noctem Artisanss - Tranquillite Rhum Jamaique

item.title: Tranquillité Whisky Canadien
item.beer_description: Barleywine aged in Canadian whisky barrels (355 ml bottle). Matured for 11 months, this strong beer at 11.9% ABV reveals aromas of toffee, caramel, and figs. The well-rounded finish showcases the woody and vanilla notes imparted by the barrels. Noctem Artisanss - Tranquillite Whisky Canadien

item.title: Destructio 0001
item.beer_description: Double IPA - Motueka Hop Kief, Motueka, Citra XTRM TURBO Messorem - Destructio 0001
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: P'tit Monstre (collab Nano Cinco)
item.beer_description: Every brewery has one. That slightly petty or frivolous employee who always teeters on the edge of being respectable and dishonorable. It's in honor of these little monsters of the brewing world that we've teamed up for the very first time with the Quebec City crew at Nano Cinco! Triple IPA EXXXXXTRA juicy, this beer will make your ears tingle! Hopped with NZ Cascade, Pacifica, Nelson Sauvin Bliss, Riwaka, and a generous dose of Riwaka and Nelson Sauvin hopkief, this beer is made, like Kellogg's Frosties, to unleash your inner beast! It's ridiculously smooth, with a slight piney bitterness but a lovely juicy presence reminiscent of tropical fruits! We're super proud of this beer brewed with our new buddies from Quebec City. Until the next one, CHEERS! Brasserie Sir John - P'tit Monstre

item.title: Barrel-Aged Ten FIDY®
item.beer_description: Aged through four seasons and from a blend of the top Bourbons around, this Ten Fidy has morphed into a monster of cranked up flavor. Espresso, burnt sugar, rich chocolate, caramel notes are now driving alongside the vanilla, oak, bourbon from the barrel and been smoothed out during maturation. Even at 12.9% (75 IBUs) it is cool and drinkable, letting each sip add more and more complexity. Oskar Blues - Barrel-Aged Ten FIDY

item.title: Imperial Smells Like Bean Spirit - Pecan Pie
item.beer_description: Imperial Breakfast Stout w/ Maple Syrup, Coffee, Brown Sugar, Pecans, and Vanilla. Mikerphone - Imperial Smells Like Bean Spirit - Pecan Pie

item.title: À L'ombre De L'Ange
item.beer_description: Far from being a reference to an Éric Lapointe song, À l'ombre de l'ange (In the Shadow of the Angel) is a truly fantastic blend. Made from a barley wine aged for 19 months in Heaven Hill bourbon barrels and an imperial stout aged for 24 months in MGP bourbon barrels, this beer embodies the tenderness of dark beers. It has a velvety, sweet character, enveloped by the warmth of the alcohol and the bourbon barrel aging. Lightly carbonated, it leans more towards the caramelized notes typical of these types of beers, almost like a sponge toffee. Easy (too easy, even) to drink, it's the kind of dark beer that brings you just close enough to gustatory heaven, or, as we like to call it, to the shadow of the angel. Brasserie Sir John - A L'ombre De L'Ange

item.title: TDH Eviscerated Pathway of Beauty
item.beer_description: Triple Dry Hopped Eviscerated Pathway of Beauty is a new take on one of our favorite Double IPAs. Like classic Eviscerated, this one starts with a base of 2 row, oat malt, and flaked oats. Hopped in the kettle with Citra, and then dry hopped again, and again, and AGAIN with EVEN MORE Citra for a bright and zesty flavor experience! Notes of tangerine gummies, lychee sorbet, and overripe honeydew. Tired Hands - TDH Eviscerated Pathway of Beauty
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Avant L'effondrement
item.beer_description: Your senses will be overwhelmed by this Quadruple IPA, which will tantalize your palate in every direction. Between the warming presence of the alcohol and the tantalizing burst of flavor from the astronomical amount of hops, this Quad IPA will give you the same sensation as the ground giving way beneath your feet, leaving you weightless. Beneath its mountain of Simcoe and Nectaron, we indulged ourselves with our favorite hop, Citra, using it in practically every form available. From regular pellets to Cryo, Incognito, Hyperboost, and Dynaboost varieties, practically all we were missing was fresh Citra in pots to have all the available options. Once blended, however, it creates a harmonious mix of sweet, dank notes of citrus zest and orange blossom on a piney base. Kudos to the artist Metafable for the label! Cheers! Brasserie Sir John - Avant L'effondrement

item.title: Eviscerated Pathway of Beauty
item.beer_description: Citra Double IPA. Brewed with oats. Hopped intensely and singularly with Citra. Tired Hands - Eviscerated Pathway of Beauty
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Evolve Or Die (2025)
item.beer_description: Our annual triple IPA where we push the hopping rates to their illogical extreme. The goal of this beer is to implement everything we’ve learned through our Dora and monthly DIPA series’. Each one is a different experiment that pushes our hoppy beer into distinctly different directions, always with the intent of making a more densely layered, and intense hop experience while still remaining soft, and endlessly drinkable. Stagnation, complacency and comfort are the enemy of progress and innovation. This is the culmination of everything we’ve learned over the past year about hoppy beer. Evolve, or die. Hopped with Citra, Mosaic, Motueka and Galaxy, this is a deeply hop saturated beer that is as undeniably cost prohibitive as it is delectably drinkable. We taste intense notes of pineapple, mango, tangerine, mojito lime, peach and tropical fruit. The hopping rate of this beer is approximately 26lbs/bbl (101g/L). Fun fact: there’s about $2.91 of hops in every can!!! Badlands - Evolve Or Die (2025)

item.title: Slø Turbo (2025)
item.beer_description: Unleaded super diesel icon 'Heavy Nelson' slides off from the stage and into the crowd. He's locked eyes on Gary and needs to strike while the lights stay low.'Pizza Pizza Pizza', he croons as a conga line grows behind him. Looking back, two thoughts occur in quick succession. The first: DIPA's hopped exclusively w/ New Zealand varietals and a laser-focus on Nelson Sauvin make all the girls want to get to know you. The second: he's only got one chance to make this right for everybody.'Heyyyy Gary from back the office who likes to order broccoli on the casual Friday staff pizza and only takes one piece for himself..' Dipa with whole cone Southern Hemisphere Hops. Hoof Hearted - Sl Turbo (2025)

item.title: Les Angles Morts
item.beer_description: Triple IPA - Superdelic, Citra, Citra Incognito, Citra Lupomax. Many things are outside our field of vision and lurk in blind spots… In particular, the raw power of a beer that may seem relatively mild at first, but is in fact the complete opposite. This is what awaits you around the bend with this Triple IPA, featuring an explosive hopping of Superdelic, Citra, Citra Incognito, and Citra Lupomax. A new sensation from New Zealand, showcasing Citra in various forms. Messorem - Les Angles Morts

item.title: Bad Moon Rising (2025) (collab Third Moon)
item.beer_description: We got together with our friends at Third Moon to brew a DIPA! For our version we used Third Moons typical DIPA malt base, and then brewed the beer with our equipment and processes. This beer was brewed with Cascade hops grown in three different regions (Washington, Australia and Ontario), technically making this a Cascade single hop beer. However, every regions Cascade presents so differently. It’s incredibly cool to be able to open three different hop bags from three different growing regions, of the same hop cultivar, and get three totally different aromas, all of which are excellent in their own right. This is Cascade, in all its classic, timeless, and multi-faceted beauty. Badlands - Bad Moon Rising (2025)

item.title: Psychedelic Wisdom
item.beer_description: PSYCHEDELIC WISDOM aims for ever-lasting brightness, with a hefty DH of peachy Luminosa, coconut-driven Sabro Cryo, fluffed up with papaya and mango from fresh Ekuanot hops, all atop a zingy, buzzing base of HBC431 on the hot side. Add some solid honey residuals for a lovely candied glaze, and you've got the perfect trick for hiding that hearty 8% ABV. Hop Hooligans - Psychedelic Wisdom
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Grog Blossom
item.beer_description: Ingredients: water, barley malt, oat flakes, oat malt, maltodextrin, dextrose, hops, West Indies Rum-Vanilla tea (berries, hibiscus), vanilla (Noir Ebene Uganda Vanilla), yeast (AEB FERMOALE AY3). Hop Hooligans - Grog Blossom

item.title: Ninth Birthday Impy
item.beer_description: Imperial 9th Birthday stout dressed up to the nines with hazelnut, chocolate, and caramel biscuits (you know which ones). We're partying like it's 9! Water, Barley (Gluten), Oats, Lactose (Milk), Hops, Yeast Neon Raptor - Ninth Birthday Impy

item.title: You For Coffee
item.beer_description: On our worldwide beer travels we can almost guarantee seeing our Polish friends Stu Mostow, so this imperial breakfast stout collaboration is long overdue. Rich coffee and sinful chocolate combined will inspire you to go for coffee yourself! Water, Barley (Gluten), Oats, Lactose (Milk), Liquid Cacao, Coffee, Hops, Yeast Neon Raptor - You For Coffee

item.title: Confection By Rackhouse
item.beer_description: The curated flavors are layered to charm both the sweet tooth and the seasoned palate. Blue raspberry, marshmallow, coconut, and chocolate mingle with a gentle touch of roast coffee, while time spent in rum, bourbon, and maple barrels lends depth with vanilla, maple, and oak. Confection is sweetness elegantly wrapped in the character of the barrels. LERVIG - Confection By Rackhouse

item.title: Night Shift Vintage 2025 / Imperial Pastry Stout Aged In Rum Barrels With Coconut & Chocolate
item.beer_description: We’re continuing our Imperial Pastry Stout series with a very special release. Inspired by the beloved coconut cube, we’ve created a beer that tastes just like it. Aged in rum barrels from Barbados, with coconut flakes and cocoa nibs, this stout captures the classic rum, coconut, and chocolate flavors in every sip. Cheers! HORIZONT - Night Shift Vintage 2025 / Imperial Pastry Stout Aged In Rum Barrels With Coconut & Chocolate

item.title: Night Shift Vintage 2025 / RIS Aged In Rhum And Vanilla Macadamia Rum Barrels
item.beer_description: A reimagined Russian Imperial Stout aged in both fresh Rhum barrels and Rum barrels previously holding macadamia nuts and vanilla. The result is silky and rich, with nutty-vanilla layers, subtle rum sweetness, and a smooth, creamy finish. HORIZONT - Night Shift Vintage 2025 / RIS Aged In Rhum And Vanilla Macadamia Rum Barrels

item.title: Night Shift Vintage 2025 / Double Chocolate Imperial Milk Porter Aged In Bourbon Barrels
item.beer_description: A creamy, sweet, double chocolate porter aged in Bourbon barrels for a rich blend of vanilla and roasted notes. Brewed with loads of cocoa nibs and extra chocolate for full decadence. Lactose adds silky texture and a dessert-like finish – pure liquid chocolate bliss! HORIZONT - Night Shift Vintage 2025 / Double Chocolate Imperial Milk Porter Aged In Bourbon Barrels

item.title: Night Shift Vintage 2025 / RIS Aged In Bourbon Maple Syrup Barrels With Chocolate & Coffee
item.beer_description: Jet-black, full-bodied Russian Imperial Stout brewed with freshly roasted Costa Rican and Ethiopian coffee and Ghanaian cocoa. Aged in Bourbon and maple syrup ex-Bourbon barrels for deep, sweet-smoky chocolate and coffee complexity - bold, refined, and utterly indulgent. HORIZONT - Night Shift Vintage 2025 / RIS Aged In Bourbon Maple Syrup Barrels With Chocolate & Coffee

item.title: Imposing Will
item.beer_description: with Garston Hops Riwaka and Nelson Sauvin Autodidact Beer - Imposing Will
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: The Way Is Shut
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout Chuao Cocoa & Coffee: A black monolith. No frills, no detours. Just a massive, raw, dense stout that still manages to remain elegant. Full-bodied cocoa: dark, bitter, deep. Full body, dense foam, almost oily texture. The sugar and alcohol fade behind the structure. A classic but incredibly effective stout. Prizm - The Way Is Shut

item.title: Built on Ashes (collab Brasserie Cambier)
item.beer_description: This beer is more than a style. It's resilience. A few months after the fire that ravaged their brewery, our friends at Cambier are back with us with an incredible collaboration, a monumental TIPA. An ode to renewal, in a glass overloaded with hops. Big juice, well-saturated, without compromise. Citra and Dolcita unfold exotic fruits and stone fruits, while Riwaka brings back her herbal and lemony notes. 9%, but very rounded, with a very clean finish. Powerful TIPA, overflowing aromas, and a lot of heart behind each sip. Prizm - Built on Ashes
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Triple New England / Hazy

item.title: Kiss The Ring (collab Rivington)
item.beer_description: This time, we've teamed up with our friends at Rivington to release a DDH Double NEIPA that's dense, fruity, and super expressive. A big 8% juice, in the same vein as our best-selling Pareto. Citra & Nectaron put on a show with a tropical palette, while Simcoe provides balance and structure. Smooth texture, almost no bitterness, XXL juice—drinkable like a caress, at 8%. Prizm - Kiss The Ring
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Strange Casualties
item.beer_description: The Prizm – Strange Casualties is a coconut imperial stout with an alcohol content of 12%. We wanted an intense and delicious stout, so we came up with a trio that does the job: coconut, tonka, vanilla . Strange Casualties is a bit like biting into a coconut ball or a Bounty. The tonka brings this almost woody roundness, and the vanilla smooths the whole thing out. On the palate it is rich , velvety , with a nice length. Prizm - Strange Casualties

item.title: Drums of Liberation
item.beer_description: DRUMS OF LIBERATION is an 8% Double Dry Hopped Double IPA (DDH DIPA), brewed with PRIZM Brewing Co.'s hoppy spirit. • Hops: Citra, Mosaic, Nelson Sauvin, Hallertau Blanc Cryo • Limited Edition Prizm - Drums of Liberation

item.title: Dawn
item.beer_description: A massive dose of flaked oats and 25 g/L of Hand Selected Strata and Citra on the dry hop. Strata has been selected with Hops Company in Barcelona The Citra has been selected in the Yakima valley at Yakima Chief Hops Prizm - Dawn
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Fuzz Effect
item.beer_description: Pouring a hazy, golden yellow, Fuzz Effect's juicy aroma leaps from the glass. Notes of a lush tropical smoothie, fresh-pressed white grape juice, and lychee sorbet race across the palate. Each sip is silky, coating the tongue with uncut hop delight. With just enough sweetness to complement the waves of fruit aromatics, Fuzz Effect finishes gently bitter and highly satisfying. Trillium - Fuzz Effect
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Extra Extra Broccoli (collab Other Half)
item.beer_description: Hazy Double India Pale Ale WeldWerks - Extra Extra Broccoli
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: 16th Anniversary – Barrel-Aged Barleywine Ale (2025)
item.beer_description: An Exclusive Blend of Barrel-Aged Barleywine Ale 16th Anniversary Barleywine Ale is a 36-month old barrel-aged barleywine ale aged in Heaven Hill® bourbon barrels blended with a touch of 12-month old barleywine ale. Each sip is more special than its last. Thank you all for being a part of this journey of experimenting, pushing the limits with new recipes, and supporting our passions for our barrel-aged program. Cheers to 16 years and many more! ABV: 16.5% IBU: 25 Color: Hazy, brown Aroma: Caramel, vanilla, molasses followed by some toffee, fig, cherry with other fruity notes, whiskey, graham cracker along with some toast, oak and walnut. Flavor: Mildly sweet, lightly bitter, moderate lingering sweetness and slightly umami. Availability: Released August 16, 2025 in celebration of our 16th anniversary Fresh Range: Age this beer, or try one now...go on. Fremont - 16th Anniversary Barrel-Aged Barleywine Ale (2025)

item.title: 33 (collab Mast Landing)
item.beer_description: Our Triple Dry Hopped Triple IPA collaboration with Mast Landing, showcasing Citra, Motueka and Sabro hops Vitamin Sea - 33

item.title: Here's To Feeling Good All the Time
item.beer_description: A worldly DIPA, liberally hopped with some of the finest hops Australia and the Pacific Northwest have to offer. Brewed with a hefty portion of wheat and oats for fluffiness on the palate. Juicy, dank, and Kramer Approved. Bissell Brothers - Here's To Feeling Good All the Time

item.title: Natural Flavors (Tangerine)
item.beer_description: Kettle Soured, Azacca & Idaho 7, Tangerine Frequentem - Natural Flavors (Tangerine)

item.title: Mania!
item.beer_description: Triple IPA with Citra, Mosaic, and Krush Hyperboost. Willibald Farm Distillery & - Mania!

item.title: West To the Sand (collab Floc. & Beak)
item.beer_description: A West Coast Triple Dry Hopped Double IPA brewed with our mates from Floc & Beak. Hopped with Columbus, Chinook, Amarillo, Nectaron, Simcoe, Amarillo Cryo, Simcoe Dynaboost & Mosaic Cryo Rivington - West To the Sand

item.title: Canna
item.beer_description: Three of our dankest hops combine in this sticky, hazy, full-throttle DIPA. Showcasing the best of Nelson Sauvin, Mosaic and Enigma for notes of resin, cedar and flinty white wine. Beak - Canna
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Cold Woods (Ghost COLD WOODS)
item.beer_description: We decided that this barleywine was worth a re-brew, especially since it has such a badass label. The brew team has gone to great lengths to take this beer to the next level, and we KNOW you're all going to love it! Think you're not a barleywine fan? Think again! Full, semi-sweet, and chewy body with a sticky texture offering malt driven notes of honey, toffee, and stone fruit with just enough bitterness for balance. Adroit Theory - Cold Woods (Ghost COLD WOODS)

item.title: Dolcita - Meet Our Friends from USA - Yakima Chief Hops (collab Yakima Chierf Hops)
item.beer_description: Beer brewed in collaboration with their friends from the US, Yakima Chief Hops. A unique single hop created to commemorate the renaming of HBC 1019, debuting as Dolcita. This beer is an explosion of aromas of spicy fruit, tropical, and citrus notes, enriched with a delicate, sweet aromatic layer. Juicy, smooth, and full-bodied. A perfect example of how a single hop can shape the entire character of a beer. Nepo - Dolcita - Meet Our Friends from USA - Yakima Chief Hops
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Discover the Barycz Valley
item.beer_description: Inspired by the extraordinary nature of the Barycza Valley and the picturesque Milicki Ponds, they created a beer that captures the lightness and freshness of this place. It's Session Hazy IPA – hazy, juicy hops, and easy to drink, perfect for discovering new flavors in good company. Nepo - Discover the Barycz Valley

item.title: D-Tonacja 9th Edition
item.beer_description: 9th edition of their cyclical, annual beer. A strong Imperial Stout with deep and intense aromas of dark chocolate, coffee and roasted malt which creates a truly decadent taste experience. Nepo - D-Tonacja 9th Edition

item.title: Crazy Lines Series: Avalanche
item.beer_description: This beer is brewed with a classic "holy trinity" blend of modern hops: Citra, Nelson Sauvin, and Motueka. Expect a soft, full, and hazy body that delivers a massive and multi-layered explosion of flavour. The profile is an intense wave of juicy tropical fruit (passionfruit), bright citrus (lime, grapefruit), and elegant white wine grape. Nepo - Crazy Lines Series: Avalanche

item.title: Crazy Lines Series: Polar Shift
item.beer_description: A hearty and refreshing beer where hops take center stage. Tropical fruits, citrus, and resin notes meet a distinct bitterness to create an intense, new wave character. Nepo - Crazy Lines Series: Polar Shift

item.title: Crazy Lines Series: Fun
item.beer_description: Neipa hopped with the HBC 630 variety Nepo - Crazy Lines Series: Fun

item.title: Genesis
item.beer_description: Genesis is a Hazy IPA that pours a pale golden color. It has a dry-hop of Palisade and Cashmere hops, which creates a kaleidoscope of aromas with notes of ripe melon, pineapple, and fresh-cut grass. Each sip reveals a soft body that fills the palate with refreshing fruity and floral flavors. A micro-universe of compounds for a universe of flavors. Basqueland - Genesis

item.title: Winner Winner Citra Dinner
item.beer_description: 10th ANNIVERSARY SERIES: 10 beers, 10 moments that made history. To celebrate our 10th anniversary, we’ve brought back Winner Winner Citra Dinner, one of the most influential beers in our history. We were pioneers in combining different formats of the same hop to maximize its aromatic power. In this case, it’s all about Citra. We’ve blended Citra T90, Citra BBC, Citra Cryo, Citra Incognito, and Citra Hyperboost to unleash a winning intensity and range of aromas: grapefruit, lime, guava, passion fruit, along with resinous and “dank” notes. It’s a true celebration of one of our most beloved hops. Basqueland - Winner Winner Citra Dinner

item.title: Omnivore
item.beer_description: Our brewers, in a stroke of genius, have forged a new path, crafting a Vegan Oat Cream IPA so smooth it feels like a dream. We bypassed the trad ways, skipping the lactose and let the colossal dose of oats make its magic. The result is a body as soft and boundless as a cloud. It's bursting with intense tropical aromas of passion fruit, and mango balanced with a 'dank' hemp profile. A truly snackable hop bite with a oat heart. Basqueland - Omnivore

item.title: Effortless Motion
item.beer_description: A Hazy TIPA with Motueka, Riwaka & Vic Secret. 'We continue our Triple IPAs with Effortless Motion, hopped with Motueka, Riwaka & Vic Secret. Absolutely love this hop combo! Motueka builds the 'factory foundation' and Riwaka brings the brightness that TIPAs need. Vic Secret is really beautiful with its bright pineapple aromas.' Head Brewer Jirka Ordén Factory - Effortless Motion

item.title: Space Rocket
item.beer_description: Space Rocket is a blend of an imperial stout aged 34 months in Heaven Hill bourbon barrels and an imperial stout aged 12 months in Jeptha Creed bourbon barrels. It was then aged on toasted organic coconut from Sri Lanka and vanilla from Madagascar. The result is a powerful and syrupy beer where the sweetness of vanilla and bourbon combines perfectly with the intensity of coconut. ***Contains lactose*** Nano Cinco - Space Rocket

item.title: Swim (collab Brasserie du Bas-Canada)
item.beer_description: Brewed for Slake's 5th anniversary Slake - Swim
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Ever Juice
item.beer_description: DDH hazy Double India Pale Ale brewed with Mosaic, Strata and Motueka hops. Tripping Animals - Ever Juice

item.title: Queen Snake (collab Tin Barn)
item.beer_description: We Did A Three Stage Triple Dry Hop With Simcoe & Citra Lauren Was Fascinated With This New Technique And We’re Pretty Sure You Will Too. Big Notes Of PASSION Fruit, Long Stem Strawberries, Peach And With Our Famous SNAKEFRUIT Finish District 96 - Queen Snake

item.title: Snake Eyes (collab The Seed: A Living Beer Project)
item.beer_description: We Binary Arid Hopped With Cashmere, More Cashmere And Even More Cashmere With A Dusting Of Citra And Vic Secret. Notes Of Watermelon, Lemon , Creamy Kumquat, Pass Lines, Press Press Press Your Bet And Our Signature Snake Fruit Finish. District 96 - Snake Eyes
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Drake Passage
item.beer_description: Citra, Peacharine and Nelson Sauvin Imperial IPA. Azvex - Drake Passage

item.title: Midnight Merkin (2025)
item.beer_description: A luxurious stout aged 18 months in bourbon and rye barrels. Vanilla, cocoa nibs, and almonds swirl into rich layers of oak, spice, and dark chocolate decadence. Firestone Walker - Midnight Merkin (2025)

item.title: Roulez Jeunesse (collab Independent)
item.beer_description: West Coast IPA DDH that combines tradition and modernity with 'old school' hops, Centennial and Chinook, which bring their resinous and racy aroma, and Citra for a very fruity explosiveness! Collab' with the Burgundy brewery Independent Beer Co. Fauve - Roulez Jeunesse

item.title: Révélateur D'Ombres
item.beer_description: We blended some of our finest barrels of Imperial Stout aged in rum barrels (which had previously contained Oloroso) to create this unique blend. For even more tropical indulgence, we added a coconut finish. The aging lasted 18 months in rum barrels. A rare beer, of which only 1,646 cans were produced! Fauve - Revelateur D'Ombres

item.title: Renaître De Ses Cendres (collab Sudden Death)
item.beer_description: A double NEIPA DDH, in collaboration with the German brewery Sudden Death. Powerful and juicy, it's brewed with three characterful hops: Mosaic, Nelson Sauvin, and Sabro, for an explosion of tropical flavors, freshness, and roundness. A beer that proves that, even after the shock, we can always come back stronger. And that the best response to sudden death... is rebirth. Fauve - Renaitre De Ses Cendres
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: J'irai Où Tu Iras (collab Brasserie du Bas-Canada)
item.beer_description: This NEIPA DDH is the result of a collaboration with Brasserie du Bas-Canada. These Quebec hop stars crossed the Atlantic with their own Citra in their suitcases, which we married with ours, adding Motueka and Simcoe. It's an aromatic bomb, juicy as can be, and resolutely transatlantic. We hope you find it as harmonious as a legendary Celine Dion / JJG duet. Fauve - J'irai Ou Tu Iras

item.title: Chambre Noire
item.beer_description: This daring blend is a blend of several Imperial Stout barrels: Peated Whiskey barrels and barrels that previously contained Hot Sauce. After blending, we finished with cocoa nibs. In short, here's an unusual mix combining smoky, spicy, and cocoa flavors...in an IS barrel-aged version! Fauve - Chambre Noire

item.title: Les Fleurs Du Mal (collab Xul)
item.beer_description: Collaboration avec Xul Beer Co. - Triple IPA aux houblons Citra, Peacharine, Rakau, Kohia Nelson, Citra Incognito & Citra Hyber Boost Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Les Fleurs Du Mal

item.title: Clock Tower Swirls (collab Aslin)
item.beer_description: This Imperial Stout was brewed in collaboration with Aslin Beer. A full bodied base is met with layers of rich chocolate, butterscotch, peanuts, and ice cream. Grab a spoon and dig in. Mortalis - Clock Tower Swirls

item.title: Néron
item.beer_description: Double IPA with Galaxy, Citra & Amarillo hops. Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Neron

item.title: ParabaNoche (2024) (collab WeldWerks)
item.beer_description: We burned the midnight oil collaborating with our friends at Weldworks Brewing Co to create one of the biggest beers we’ve ever brewed. A massive stout stuffed with specialty malts matured for 18 months in special Parker’s Heritage Whiskey barrels, the final blend radiates with sweet flavors of dark chocolate, caramel, roasted coffee, vanilla and whiskey. Firestone Walker - ParabaNoche (2024)

item.title: Mashish W/Peanut Butter, Chocolate, And Marshmallow
item.beer_description: Our base Mashish with some peanut butter, chocolate, and marshmallow. DankHouse - Mashish W/Peanut Butter, Chocolate, And Marshmallow

item.title: Sleep Mode (2024)
item.beer_description: A new blend of barleywine from our stock of mature barrels–don’t hit snooze on Sleep Mode. Comprising liquid gold matured for 36 months in Weller wheated whiskey and Heaven Hill bourbon barrels, this beer pours a chestnut brown before opening up with aromas and flavors of dark chocolate-covered caramel, cherry, and dried fruit. Firestone Walker - Sleep Mode (2024)

item.title: Triple Cheeseburger
item.beer_description: The big brother to Double Cheeseburger, dry hopped with Rakau, Motueka, Nelson Sauvin, and Kohia Nelson Hop Kief. DankHouse - Triple Cheeseburger

item.title: Distributed Ledger
item.beer_description: A New England style TIPA - triple dry hopped with Citra, Motueka and Simcoe. Spyglass - Distributed Ledger

item.title: Cantuccini
item.beer_description: The Cantuccini is our love letter to this famous little almond biscuit from Tuscany. Far from being as dry as the biscotti that inspires it, our version of the Cantuccini is a liquid nectar, rich in flavor and body that is perfect as a digestif or at the end of the evening. Brewed and packaged with espresso coffee from our friends at KOHI Micro-roaster, Madagascar vanilla, Upala cacao nibs, lactose, maple syrup and LOTS of toasted almonds. After the first sip, you too will be writing to yourself: 'mio dio questo è buono! Grazie Sir Giovanni!' Brasserie Sir John - Cantuccini
