item.title: Sun JUJU (collab Ology)
item.beer_description: Hazy IPA with Peacharine, Kohia Nelson and Simcoe Hops brewed in collaboration with Ology out of Tampa Bay Florida Tripping Animals - Sun JUJU

item.title: Living Large
item.beer_description: Finback - Living Large

item.title: TERNION
item.beer_description: brewed w/ cryo mosaic & super sauvin (NZ), dry hopped w/ krush, nelson sauvin (NZ), and sabro HOMES - TERNION

item.title: Sumi Ink (2025)
item.beer_description: Imperial stout aged in bourbon barrels with vanilla beans. This storied beer was named for a festival-goer’s mishap: in need of a display bottle of stout while pouring at a beer festival, Lauren filled a bomber with diluted sumi ink that she had at home and put a cap and label on it. After the festival was over, the fascimile had disappeared. Whomever took the bottle was, sadly, in for a disappointment! Grimm Artisanal Ales - Sumi Ink (2025)

item.title: Triple Nelson & Cream
item.beer_description: The third release in our Nelson Oat Cream IPA Series features a large dry-hop of Nelson Sauvin, Peacharine, and Riwaka hops. Expect big citrus, grapefruit, and passionfruit notes in a smooth, creamy, easy-drinking body. Fine Balance - Triple Nelson & Cream

item.title: Nelson & Cream
item.beer_description: The first in our quadruple Nelson Oat Cream IPA Series, Nelson & Cream IPA was dry-hopped with Nelson Sauvin and Nelson Sauvin Hyperboost from Yakima Valley. Expect a smooth, creamy mouthfleel, with big tropical stone fruit flavours. Fine Balance - Nelson & Cream

item.title: Double Nelson & Cream
item.beer_description: The second in our Nelson Oat Cream IPA Series, this DIPA was dry-hopped with Nelson Sauvin, Motueka & Mosaic. Expect notes of over-ripe tropical fruit, pineapple, and mango with a sightly dank finish and piney finish. Fine Balance - Double Nelson & Cream
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: A Toast To Ten
item.beer_description: A tenth anniversary beer. Hazy, juicy, strong citrus. Citra, Mosaic, Motueka & Peacharine. Hop Butcher For The World - A Toast To Ten
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Players 1 - Batch 2 (collab Three Chiefs)
item.beer_description: Players 1 (Batch 2) is an American Imperial Stout brewed with Madagascar vanilla beans, Fiji cacao nibs, toasted coconut, and Mostra Coffee ghost bear espresso. No lactose was harmed in this beers creation. It pours jet black with a beautiful deep tan head. The dynamics of the relative adjunct strength shift as the beer warms and time lengthens. Batch 2 has the same creamy flavor of some of our favorite things: coffee at first and then a transformation to chocolate brownie batter sprinkled with toasted coconut flakes followed by notes of vanilla-marshmallow to balance it out. Equilibrium - Players 1 - Batch 2

item.title: Frothy
item.beer_description: DDH DIPA with Enigma, Citra, Hallertau Blanc and Mosaic hops. Finback - Frothy

item.title: Tres Hekse (collab Brujos)
item.beer_description: Cross-continental hop witchcraft with our friends at Brujos — Idaho 7, Citra, Simcoe, and experimental Rakau from New Zealand for extra tropical juiciness. This hazy triple hits with tropical aromatics that'll transport you from Copenhagen to Mexico City in one sip. To l - Tres Hekse

item.title: Georgia Gold
item.beer_description: NO PEACH OR PASSIONFRUIT ADDED! Inspired by the peach and nectarine groves blossoming around Penedès, where the fruit swells day by day. Imagine biting into the juiciest peach ever — dripping down your arms and ruining your t-shirt, but you don’t care. Fermented with White Labs’ London Fog yeast, this brew naturally develops bright passionfruit notes, blending into the ultimate fruit salad with a raspberry drizzle on top. Garage - Georgia Gold

item.title: NEEDLES
item.beer_description: WEST COAST IPA BREWED WITH CITRA T90 AND SPECTRUM, MOSAIC SPECTRUM, SIMCOE AND COLUMBUS TO ACHIEVE CITRUS PEEL AND PINE FLAVORS Garage - NEEDLES

item.title: Heavy Things (2022) (collab The Bruery)
item.beer_description: -Brewmaster's Collective Exclusive- Brewed in collaboration with our friends at The Bruery, Heavy Things is a decadent barleywine co-fermented with maple syrup and then aged in brandy barrels for 8 months that pushes the limits of what our house yeast is capable of. The unique fermentation and barrel finishing give it a sweet and malty profile with huge flavors of maple syrup, toffee, bananas foster, candied apple, and figs. Firestone Walker - Heavy Things (2022)

item.title: Rye Double DBA (2022)
item.beer_description: -Brewmaster's Collective Exclusive- A special imperial edition of the beer that started it all for Firestone Walker: DBA. We added a dash of rye to the original DBA mash bill, then aged the beer in 10-year-old rye whiskey barrels. Peppery spice notes from the rye play perfectly off DBA's caramel and butterscotch character, creating an amped-up iteration of a brewery classic. Firestone Walker - Rye Double DBA (2022)

item.title: Vertige
item.beer_description: Vertige is brewed with a combination of New Zealand hops (Nelson Sauvin and Motueka) and American hops (Citra). It's the union of three hops that we particularly love for their unique characters. Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Vertige

item.title: Héliades
item.beer_description: Double IPA with Nelson Sauvin and Motueka hops Brasserie du Bas-Canada - Heliades

item.title: Chasing Trees: Strain 24
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Vera, Anchovy, and Citra. DankHouse - Chasing Trees: Strain 24

item.title: High-Low
item.beer_description: double dry hopped with Mosaic, Amarillo, Citra, Belma, Blanc, El Dorado, Waimea, Idaho 7 and Nelson Finback - High-Low
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Mutant Turtle Pizza
item.beer_description: Dry hopped with Anchovy, Nelson Sauvin, Nectaron, and Maui Nelson Hop Kief. DankHouse - Mutant Turtle Pizza
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Aspect of Leo
item.beer_description: Citra-Hopped India Pale Ale Brewed With Blood Orange Hop Butcher For The World - Aspect of Leo

item.title: Dirty Monkey
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout w/Banana, Coffee, Chocolate, Pineapple and Coconut Commonwealth - Dirty Monkey

item.title: Digi Digi Digi
item.beer_description: In the words of the great Rza.......Hoppy Hoppy Hoppy, Digi Digi Digi. You're a** will be stuck on this beer like a Victoria Secret wedgie. We dry hopped this one with Citra, Strata, and Nectaron. DankHouse - Digi Digi Digi

item.title: Triple Stars
item.beer_description: Triple Stars is filled with raw wheat, malted wheat, and flaked wheat which makes it ethereal and soft. It’s triple-dry hopped with Strata, Vic Secret, and Citra hops. If you know these hops, you know this beer is ultra juicy, full of orange juice, mango and grapefruit essence. This beer is super phosphorescent (minus the radiation...) and ultra bright. It’s velvety and full and bursting with flavor. PS: The label of only one can is upside down attached. Perhaps a collector's item? Please, specifically ask for it if you want this one. Celestial Beerworks - Triple Stars

item.title: Cosmic Mountain
item.beer_description: Citra, Waimea & Mosaic-hopped Triple India Pale Ale Hop Butcher For The World - Cosmic Mountain

item.title: Double Stars
item.beer_description: Double Stars approaches the traditional malt base with a slight twist. Instead of using just oats and wheat, we focused on 3 kinds of wheat to give the beer more of a velvety and fluffy body. It’s brewed with malted wheat, raw wheat, and flaked wheat. Hopped with delightful amounts of Idaho 7 and Vic Secret, this beer has a complex aroma of dank pineapple and mango that explodes out of your glass. This 8% banger is slightly viscous with loads of body and softness. Double Stars is full of passionfruit, mango flesh and ripe pineapple, and is as juicy as can be. Celestial Beerworks - Double Stars
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Maniac Brainiac (collab Cerebral)
item.beer_description: Finback - Maniac Brainiac

item.title: Balle Perdue (collab Messorem)
item.beer_description: It's happened to all of us. A home run with a little too much arm juice that sends the ball flying off a flat roof. A drive after a visit to the bar that sends the ball into the 6th-floor pond. A wrist shot in the cafeteria that sends the foosball ball too close to a lifeguard. That's kind of where this beer gets its name from. We were at Messorem's, playing a quick game of impromptu deck hockey, when a slightly imprecise slap shot made the ball disappear under the barrels. There's no more magic in the name than that. But in the beer, there... phew! It's heavy! We blended two Barley Wines. One aged 16 months in St. Augustine bourbon barrels and another aged 18 months in Ninkasi French whiskey barrels. Then conditioned with Madagascar vanilla to round out its already very sweet side! It's sick! A beautiful and minimal acidity on the tip of the tongue followed by the light sparkle of carbonation. Chocolatey aromas of caramel brownies, figs, dates, rub shoulders with the woody presence of whiskey and bourbon. Finesse, suppleness, delicacy under an untimely invigorating heat. We may never have found the ball, but we found you a damn good beer! CHEERS! Brasserie Sir John - Balle Perdue

item.title: Crux
item.beer_description: Hops: Strata • Krush Tasting Notes: Peach • Strawberry • Pine ABV: 6.5% Outer Range - Crux

item.title: Hops Fwd
item.beer_description: A select group of breweries are chosen to test Yakima Chief's new hop products, and we're thrilled to be among them! This triple NEIPA features YCH803 Citra, a new, highly aromatic hop extract. Combined with Nelson Sauvin, Krush, and conventional Citra, this blend is bursting with tropical fruit flavors and represents a step into the future of hoppy beer! Noctem Artisanss - Hops Fwd

item.title: Big Pharma
item.beer_description: Hawaiian tropical vibes District 96 - Big Pharma

item.title: Trade War
item.beer_description: Hopped with Enigma and Vic secret. Orange, berry, and tropical fruits. District 96 - Trade War
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: A Deathless Song
item.beer_description: This Barrel aged Tiramisu stout was created for the wedding of Caitlin and Robin. Aged for 1,5 years on a Jamaican Rum barrel and 2 Bourbon Barrels. Brewed with typical Boudoir cookies and coffeebeans, infused with homemade Amaretto. Galea - A Deathless Song

item.title: The Mind of Annapurna Bourbon Barrel Aged
item.beer_description: The Mind of Annapurna BA, is a imperial Chai Latté Milk Stout aged for 2 years in 2nd fill Buffalo Trace Bourbon Barrels. 2nd fill in this case means a Bourbon finished on a Bourbon barrel. So 2 times filled with a Bourbon before our stout. The taste of the spices in the beer is more round, some vanilla and barrel notes and a nice bourbon flavour. Galea - The Mind of Annapurna Bourbon Barrel Aged

item.title: MEGA MUFFIN
item.beer_description: with YCH 701 HyperBoost Stigbergets - MEGA MUFFIN

item.title: EL CAPITANO
item.beer_description: Let’s do a pelican but call it EL CAPITANO. The captain of all DIPA. Stigbergets - EL CAPITANO
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: TOP PICK (collab Omnipollo)
item.beer_description: After receiving some freshly emptied bourbon barrels direct from Balcones Distillery in Texas we were itching to brew something big, dark and ridiculous. The obvious answer was to give our friend Henok from Omnipollo a ring and ask if he fancied helping us conjure something up. After almost 2 years of aging we decided it was time to take out the beer and lightly enhance it with coconut, hazelnut and vanilla so as to not get too much in the way of the barrel character. Stigbergets - TOP PICK

item.title: NECROPUNK (Ghost NECROPUNK) (collab P.i.g.s.)
item.beer_description: How would it feel, if you were playing the guitar at your mom's bedroom, and Cannibal Corpse invited you to share the stage? This huge DIPA, is the result of our collaboration with our favourite brewing company, the mighty Adroit Theory. And this, also is, a great proof that sometimes dreams come true. Or nightmares, in this case! Brewed and released, back to back, with NECROSYNTH Hazy QIPA. Adroit Theory - NECROPUNK (Ghost NECROPUNK)
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: 9 Years: Return To Ithaca
item.beer_description: Coming home after a long journey – that feeling is captured in every sip of this quadrupel. Layered with notes of raisins, dried fruit, and smooth caramel—a beer steeped in warmth and memory. What sets it apart is its nuanced oak treatment: spirals, cubes, and a touch of liquid tannins lend soft vanilla, gentle spice, and refined wood tones that elevate without overpowering. Brewed with barley, rye, wheat, and spelt, it boasts a full, rounded body and a deeply expressive malt character. A beer full of stories—complex, comforting, and unforgettable Moersleutel - 9 Years: Return To Ithaca

item.title: 9 Years: Scylla And Charybdis
item.beer_description: A stout that challenges you, just like the legendary sea monsters Scylla and Charybdis. This rich 11% stout delivers an irresistible combination of peanuts, cacao, and nougat – inspired by a famous candy bar, but even better. With 300 kg of peanuts and 60 kg of Bolivian cacao, known for its natural nutty flavor, you get a deep and rich foundation. Bold roasted coffee adds earthy depth, while vanilla rounds everything out with a smooth, creamy finish. Complex and full of character, yet always perfectly balanced. A stout so captivating, even the raging sea monsters pause to enjoy this treat. Moersleutel - 9 Years: Scylla And Charybdis

item.title: Château (collab Third Moon)
item.beer_description: Château is a New England Double IPA brewed in collaboration with our Ontario friends, Third Moon. A tropical explosion crafted with 100% Freestyle Hops: NZ Cascade, Peacharine, Rakau, Motueka SubZero Hop Kief, and NZ Cascade Hop Kief. This hop cocktail releases vibrant notes of citrus, tropical fruit, and ripe peach, supported by a smooth texture and gentle bitterness. The kind of DIPA we love—powerful and velvety. Cheers! Nano Cinco - Chateau
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Bistro Peach Strawberry Rhubarb Cobbler
item.beer_description: Berliner style weisse beer with peaches, strawberries, rhubarb, cinnamon & vanilla. Energy City - Bistro Peach Strawberry Rhubarb Cobbler

item.title: 12yr Wild Turkey BA Dark Matter (2025)
item.beer_description: This was aged in some very unique 12-year-old Wild Turkey barrels for 12 months and 5 days. The bourbon from these barrels is a rare Japanese-only release and one of the few 12-year-old Wild Turkeys ever made. Barreled Souls - 12yr Wild Turkey BA Dark Matter (2025)

item.title: BA Sticky Situation (collab Bolero Snort)
item.beer_description: We teamed up with our best buds @bolerosnort 18 months ago to make this decadent imperial pastry stout. We then rested it in Heaven Hill barrels for 17 months, then conditioned this in our lil spin bot over hundreds of pounds of Thai bananas and monkey rolls. Bring napkins. Imprint - BA Sticky Situation

item.title: Neo-baa-litan (Chocolate)
item.beer_description: Strawberry, Chocolate, and Fluff - series inspired by AJ Baa Baa Brewhouse - Neo-baa-litan (Chocolate)

item.title: Bistro Cabana Watermelon & Pomegranate
item.beer_description: Berliner-style weisse beer with watermelon and pomegranate. Energy City - Bistro Cabana Watermelon & Pomegranate

item.title: Double Stack
item.beer_description: Double Stack is our Imperial Breakfast Stout aged on whole bean coffee from Portland's Coava Coffee and maple syrup. Great Notion - Double Stack

item.title: 9 Years: Siren Encounter
item.beer_description: Dark, deep, and irresistibly tempting. Siren Encounter is a rich English stout at 8%, triple mashed for maximum body. Brewed with only English ingredients: Bramling Cross hops for an earthy berry note, a range of warm, chocolate malts, and classic Fullers yeast for a smooth, silky mouthfeel. High mash temperatures and slow fermentation keep the beer full-bodied without being overly sweet. Packed with flavors of chocolate, toast, and a hint of berry. Full of character, layered, and surprisingly drinkable. Singing sirens? Odysseus tied himself down. You just take another sip. Moersleutel - 9 Years: Siren Encounter

item.title: Vilify
item.beer_description: 6th anniversary Sazerac Rye BA imperial stout - 12 months. Brewed and cared for at Bere a la Cluj. Blackout - Vilify

item.title: Memnu - Barton 1792 BA
item.beer_description: Baklava inspired strong ale with walnuts, almonds, honey and vanilla. Aged for 16 months in a single barrel. Blackout - Memnu - Barton 1792 BA

item.title: Be Kind, Rewind
item.beer_description: Because Beer is Better with Friends, Be Kind, Rewind is a collab with our Carolina friends Leah & JT of @replaybrewing & Carly & Nick of @funguysbrewing . This Triple New England was hopped with Citra, Nectaron and HBC 638. We timed this release so that we could have it ready to pour along side our friends at @yah_brew_mountjoy 90’s inspired beer fest this weekend, Fresh Brews in Pennsylvania. . Tin Barn - Be Kind, Rewind

item.title: Baby G.O.A.T.
item.beer_description: Introducing the newest in our Baby Animal Series - Baby G.O.A.T! This single New England IPA was hopped with Citra, Bru-1, and Motueka to create a juicy pineapple bomb that is the Greatest of All Time! Tin Barn - Baby G.O.A.T.

item.title: Mosaic Monster
item.beer_description: This hazy beast of a Double New England IPA is double dry-hopped with an unruly dose of Mosaic and Citra. This juicy titan unleashes an explosive bouquet of mango, candied orange peel, and dank tropical haze to tame the monster within. It’s dangerously drinkable — unleash with caution. Tin Barn - Mosaic Monster
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Tiny Esses
item.beer_description: Sour ale with Skittles Prairie Artisan Ales - Tiny Esses

item.title: Bain D'agrumes
item.beer_description: Citrus Bath is a New England IPA in which we've taken the Citra experience to the next level: Citra T90 pellets (Coleman Agriculture), Citra Dynaboost (Yakima Chief) hot, and Citra Spectrum (John I. Haas) cold. And for even more zing, we added bitter orange peel and blood orange slices during the hot brewing process. The result? An ultra-juicy citrus explosion, with vibrant notes of lemon, grapefruit, and especially explosive orange notes. A true hoppy orange juice! Nano Cinco - Bain D'agrumes

item.title: Cinco
item.beer_description: Cinco is a Double New England IPA hopped with Nelson Sauvin, HBC 1019, and Peacharine. It offers a silky body and an explosion of aromas of peach, nectarine, and ripe stone fruit. Cinco isn't just the name of the beer; it's also the name of Mathieu's dog, the brewmaster and co-founder of the brewery. It was Cinco who inspired the brewery's name almost 10 years ago, when we were just a group of friends brewing beer for fun in Mathieu's apartment. A name that stuck! A loyal, curious companion who was always underfoot during brewing. Nano Cinco - Cinco
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Hello My Name Is - Vanille
item.beer_description: Imperial stout aged in rye whisky barrels that previously held maple syrup, then finished with Mexican vanilla. A particularly rich and syrupy beer with notes of maple syrup, vanilla, cocoa, and spirits. Nano Cinco - Hello My Name Is - Vanille

item.title: Bomb!
item.beer_description: Bomb! is an imperial stout aged on Spaceship Earth espresso beans, chocolate, vanilla beans, and ancho chile peppers. All the flavors meld to create a truly unique beer. The peppers add just the right amount of heat to complement the intense coffee and chocolate flavors. Prairie Artisan Ales - Bomb!

item.title: Aspect of Taurus
item.beer_description: Citra, Lorien & Sabro-hopped Double India Pale Ale Hop Butcher For The World - Aspect of Taurus
item.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

item.title: Hydra | Apricot + Mango + Raspberry
item.beer_description: This Fruited Sour blends apricot, mango, and raspberry to form just one of this monster’s many heads. Keep your eyes peeled for even more flavor combinations. Mortalis - Hydra | Apricot + Mango + Raspberry

item.title: Abandon The Halogens (2022)
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout brewed with honey and lactose and aged in bourbon barrels Jackie Os - Abandon The Halogens (2022)

item.title: Bourbon Barrel Black Maple (2025)
item.beer_description: Black Maple features a diverse grist of barley, wheat, chocolate malt, caramel malt, and a pinch of smoked malt. Locally harvested maple syrup was added in the boil kettle before aging in bourbon barrels. A long time brewery favorite! This batch aged in bourbon barrels for 24 months and was conditioned on an extra addition of local maple syrup post barrels. Jackie Os - Bourbon Barrel Black Maple (2025)

item.title: Braaaaaaaains - Billions of Peaches
item.beer_description: Billions of Peaches Braaaaaaaains is loaded up with three commas worth of peaches, more peaches, a few more peaches, apricot and some more apricot. Then we hit it with our double secret smoothie treatment of sea salt, lactose and vanilla beans. Drekker - Braaaaaaaains - Billions of Peaches

item.title: Vanilla Coffee Bourbon Barrel Dark Apparition (2025)
item.beer_description: Seven malts were used to create deep flavors of coffee, chocolate, caramel, and molasses. A hint of bitterness and herbal character from carefully selected European and American hops help support the monolithic maltiness. This special batch was aged in bourbon barrels and conditioned on Malagasy vanilla beans and whole Thunderkiss espresso beans. This year’s vintage of Vanilla Coffee Bourbon Barrel Dark Apparition was aged in select Wild Turkey, Knob Creek and Willett barrels ranging from 13 to 26 months and conditioned on the Thuderkiss Espresso Blend and a blend of Tahitian and Madagascar vanilla beans. Jackie Os - Vanilla Coffee Bourbon Barrel Dark Apparition (2025)

item.title: Churro Puffs
item.beer_description: Cinnamon sugar with a warm, soft, and doughy center, make Churros the perfect inspiration for our newest dessert-inspired stout. Churro Puffs take our base imperial stout recipe and add toasted almond, marshmallow, and a light addition of cinnamon. Pitch black with a frothy cap, we get aromas of early mornings at the bake shop, chocolate-covered almond bars, and a touch of sweet cinnamon. A rich and velvety brownie batter-like foundation is laced with flavors of toasted almond, marshmallow-stuffed cinnamon donut holes, and sugar cookie dough. The balanced addition of cinnamon complements the flavors, gently checking all the boxes for liquid culinary bliss. Equilibrium - Churro Puffs

item.title: COCO PALMER HOUSE
item.beer_description: This Brownie Pastry Stout was brewed with chocolate, walnuts, vanilla and coconut. BreWskey - COCO PALMER HOUSE

item.title: MC3PO (collab Great Notion)
item.beer_description: Brewed in collaboration with Great Notion Deep in the dark lab, two legendary forces collide to study all things science. Whether it’s mass-energy equivalence of a neutron star, trying to survive another council meeting on Coruscant, or creating the newest IPA, MC3PO is there. With a space-time-bending mix of hops to keep the droid in you satisfied, MC3PO starts off with a 2-row and white wheat base before a Mosaic Incognito, Mosaic Lupomax, Mosaic, Strata, and Amarillo hop bill to keep all your taste bud circuits firing. Smooth and bright flavors of pineapple and mango meet bright citrus with a touch of lime and a complex, dank earthiness and a touch of resinous bitterness. Equilibrium - MC3PO

item.title: Gypsy Outpost - Coconut, Vanilla Beans, Cocoa Nibs and Cinnamon
item.beer_description: This variant of Gypsy Outpost celebrates the delicious flavors within our favorite Girl Scout Cookie. We brew a thick, rich, chocolaty base beer before conditioning upon heaps of toasted coconut, vanilla beans, cocoa nibs and cinnamon. Sip this pastry porter with your friends reminiscing about youthful adventures in the deep woods. Humble Forager - Gypsy Outpost - Coconut, Vanilla Beans, Cocoa Nibs and Cinnamon

item.title: SEVER (collab Third Moon)
item.beer_description: Brownies, Cacao, Terpenes - Collab with Third Moon All My Friends - SEVER

item.title: X Anniversary 6/10 Quadrupel BBA
item.beer_description: X Anniversary 6/10 Quadrupel BBA - sixth in a series of anniversary beers. Quadrupel, brewed with extract of 30° Plato, features a milt profile composed of Pilsner and caramel malts. Fermented with a Belgian yeast strain, it offers aromas of dark fruits and subtle spicy notes. Aged for 18 months in Jack Daniel's barrels, it was infused before bottling with almonds, hazelnuts, and pecans. The result is a Quadrupel characterized by caramel and toasted flavors, complemented by notes of dried dark fruits. Barrel aging adds layers of vanilla, coconut, and refined alcohol warmth, while the nut blend creates an intriguing and harmonious finish. Stu Mostow - X Anniversary 6/10 Quadrupel BBA

item.title: 30,000 Steps
item.beer_description: The pineapple is one of the most elbow-throwing fruits in the world when it comes to assertive flavours and acidity. It doesn’t wait in line, ask for directions, or care what you think. In fact, pineapples are kind of assholes. If you’ve ever experienced the joys of carving one up, you understand even better. Our challenge with this blend was to crush the spirit of the pineapple in order to have it behave like a decent member of fruit society. Balance was the goal of this blend. Fruiting rates are not one size-fits-all, so an understanding of the target pineapple profile was key for us. Despite the general constitution of the pineapple it does have many great qualities. The flavour comes from the chemical compound Ethyl Butyrate, which is a commonly occurring ester in nature. Bright like the sun, it’s best enjoyed in pleasurable doses, as over indulging burns. We feel the intensity and level we achieved in this blend is on the mark. In the end, we made a new friend in pineapple. Trial & Ale - 30,000 Steps

item.title: Love Potion
item.beer_description: Our second collab with the Sisters A. Chocolate brand: a rich double milk stout with strawberries, organic vanilla and Peruvian cacaovella. This is a smooth, delicate and creamy chocolate stout, with notes of ripe berries. Varvar Brew - Love Potion

item.title: Planet 2 (PULP)
item.beer_description: Strawberry Banana Raspberry Thickshake PULP! We’re back with a new thickshake! Continuing with creamy and sweet banana, we paired this one with the freshest strawberries and raspberries. Pours thick and creamy as you would except! Loads and loads of banana from start to finish with bright strawberries merged seamlessly throughout… we added a dose of raspberries to provide some tangyness and complexity to the mix. They also provide a beautiful color. Very cool combination of flavors if you ask us, subtle and gentle in company, but also very powerful! Flip can to mix, this beer contains high levels of fruit that may settle in the can! After mixing, let the can rest for a few minutes to avoid foaming from the can. Store cold! This beer is vegan. Elmeleven - Planet 2 (PULP)

item.title: Speedway Stout: Peanut Butter Cup Edition
item.beer_description: Imperial Stout with Cacao Nibs, Roasted Peanuts, Sea Salt, and Coffee. We’ve transformed our classic Speedway Stout into a decadent peanut butter cup-inspired treat. Roasted peanuts blend with rich chocolate malts, bold coffee, and Dominican cacao nibs. The result is a perfect balance of salty, roasty peanuts and rich, decadent chocolate. Subtle sweetness, warming alcohol, and smooth chocolate create a well-rounded sip. AleSmith - Speedway Stout: Peanut Butter Cup Edition

item.title: Color Theory
item.beer_description: A Sour Ale with papayas, pistachio nuts, raspberries, and vanilla soft serve. Spyglass - Color Theory

item.title: From Underneath (2025)
item.beer_description: From Underneath is our 10% ABV chocolate porter which is brewed with a rich blend of chocolate & brown malts and an excessive amount of the finest chocolate we can source. Expect a medium-bodied beer that has huge notes of milk and baker's chocolate with some light cold brewed coffee on the finish. Third Moon - From Underneath (2025)

item.title: Sous Pression
item.beer_description: Everyone knows, of course, the famous song by Queen and the Starman, David Bowie. Few people know that they were all very close to a certain Sir John who, at the time, was only at the stage of refining his IPA recipes. This beautiful IPA, far from its British counterparts, is typical of big American juices. Hopped with NelSon Sauvin, Nelson Sauvin Cryo, Rakau, Cascade NZ and Hopkief from Southern Cross, it has also been boosted with a nice dose of honey during the boil to add roundness and creaminess to this beautiful hop bomb. So, do like Ziggy and put on your éclair or do like Freddy and don your best mustache and party on! Brasserie Sir John - Sous Pression
